Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(** * Univalent Foundations. Vladimir Voevodsky. Feb. 2010 - Sep. 2011. Port to coq
     trunk (8.4-8.5) in March 2014. The third part of the original uu0 file,
     created on Dec. 3, 2014.

   Only one universe is used, and it is never used as a type.

   The only axiom we use is [ funextemptyAxiom ], which is the functional
   extensionality axiom for functions with values in the empty type.  Any
   results that don't depend on axioms should be in an earlier file.

*)

(** ** Contents
- More results on propositions
- Isolated points and types with decidable equality
 - Basic results on complements to a point
 - Basic results on types with an isolated point
 - Weak equivalences and isolated points
 - Recomplement on functions
 - Standard weak equivalences between [compl T t1] and [compl T t2]
   for isolated t1 and t2
 - Transposition of two isolated points
 - Types with decidable equality
  - unit
  - bool
  - coprod
 - Splitting of X into a coproduct by X -> bool
- Semi-boolean hfiber of functions over isolated points
 - hfibers of ii1 and ii2
 - ii1 and ii2 map isolated points to isolated points
 - hfibers of coprodf of two functions
 - Coproduct of two functions of h-level n is of h-level n
 - h-levels of coproducts and their component types
 - h-fibers of the sum of two functions sumofmaps f g
 - The sum of two functions of h-level (S (S n)) is of h-level
   (S (S n))
 - The sum of two functions of h-level n with non-intersecting images
   is of h-level n
 - Coproducts and complements
- Decidable propositions and decidable inclusions
 - Decidable propositions
 - Paths to and from an isolated point form a decidable proposition
 - Decidable inclusions
 - Decidable inclusions and isolated points
 - Decidable inclusions and coprojections
 *)

(** ** Preamble *)

(** Imports *)

Require Export UniMath.Foundations.PartB.
Require Export UniMath.Foundations.UnivalenceAxiom.

(** *** More results on propositions *)



X: UU
isaprop (¬ X)


X: UU
isaprop (¬ X)

  
X: UU
isProofIrrelevant (¬ X)

  
X: UU
x, x': ¬ X
x = x'
 apply (funextempty X x x').
Defined.


X: UU
isaprop (isProofIrrelevant X)


X: UU
isaprop (isProofIrrelevant X)

  
X: UU
isaprop (isProofIrrelevant X)
 
X: UU
isProofIrrelevant (isProofIrrelevant X)
 
X: UU
i, j: isProofIrrelevant X
i = j

  
X: UU
i, j: isProofIrrelevant X
x, y: X
i x y = j x y

  
X: UU
i, j: isProofIrrelevant X
x, y: X
q, p: x = y
p = q

  
X: UU
i, j: isProofIrrelevant X
x, y: X
q, p: x = y
isProofIrrelevant X
 assumption.
Defined.

(** See also [ isapropneg2 ] *)



X: UU
isaprop (¬¬ X)


X: UU
isaprop (¬¬ X)

  
X: UU
x: ¬¬ X
∏ x' : ¬¬ X, isofhlevel 0 (x = x')
 apply (isapropneg (neg X)).
Defined.


Definition isaninvprop (X : UU) := isweq (todneg X).

Definition invimpl (X : UU) (is : isaninvprop X) : (dneg X) -> X
  := invmap (make_weq (todneg X) is).



X: UU
isaninvprop X → isaprop X


X: UU
isaninvprop X → isaprop X

  
X: UU
X0: isaninvprop X
isaprop X

  apply (isofhlevelweqb (S O) (make_weq (todneg X) X0) (isapropdneg X)).
Defined.



X: UU
isaninvprop (¬ X)


X: UU
isaninvprop (¬ X)

  
X: UU
isaninvprop (¬ X)

  
X: UU
f:= todneg (¬ X): ¬ X → ¬¬ ¬ X
isaninvprop (¬ X)

  
X: UU
f:= todneg (¬ X): ¬ X → ¬¬ ¬ X
g:= negf (todneg X): ¬ ¬¬ X → ¬ X
isaninvprop (¬ X)

  
X: UU
f:= todneg (¬ X): ¬ X → ¬¬ ¬ X
g:= negf (todneg X): ¬ ¬¬ X → ¬ X
is1:= isapropneg X: isaprop (¬ X)
isaninvprop (¬ X)

  
X: UU
f:= todneg (¬ X): ¬ X → ¬¬ ¬ X
g:= negf (todneg X): ¬ ¬¬ X → ¬ X
is1:= isapropneg X: isaprop (¬ X)
is2:= isapropneg (¬¬ X): isaprop (¬ ¬¬ X)
isaninvprop (¬ X)

  apply (isweqimplimpl f g is1 is2).
Defined.



X: UU
isaprop X → isaprop (decidable X)

(* uses [funextemptyAxiom] *)

X: UU
isaprop X → isaprop (decidable X)

  
X: UU
i: isaprop X
isaprop (decidable X)
 
X: UU
i: isaprop X
isaprop X
X: UU
i: isaprop X
isaprop (¬ X)
X: UU
i: isaprop X
X → ¬ X → ∅

  
X: UU
i: isaprop X
isaprop X
 exact i.
  
X: UU
i: isaprop X
isaprop (¬ X)
 apply isapropneg.
  
X: UU
i: isaprop X
X → ¬ X → ∅
 exact (λ x n, n x).
Defined.

(** ** Isolated points and types with decidable equality. *)


(** *** Basic results on complements to a point *)


Definition compl (X : UU) (x : X) := ∑ x', x != x'.
Definition make_compl (X : UU) (x : X) := tpair (λ x' : X, x != x').
Definition pr1compl (X : UU) (x : X) := @pr1 _ (λ x' : X, x != x').



X: UU
x: X
isincl (pr1compl X x)


X: UU
x: X
isincl (pr1compl X x)

  
X: UU
x: X
isincl (pr1compl X x)
 apply (isinclpr1 _ (λ x' : X, isapropneg _)).
Defined.

Definition recompl (X : UU) (x : X) : compl X x ⨿ unit -> X
  := λ u : _,
       match u with
       | ii1 x0 => pr1compl _ _ x0
       | ii2 t => x
       end.

Definition maponcomplincl {X Y : UU} (f : X -> Y) (is : isincl f) (x : X) :
  compl X x -> compl Y (f x)
  := λ x0' : _,
       match x0' with
         tpair _ x' neqx => tpair _ (f x')
                                 (negf (invmaponpathsincl  _ is x x') neqx)
       end.


X, Y: UU
w: X ≃ Y
x: X
compl X x ≃ compl Y (w x)


X, Y: UU
w: X ≃ Y
x: X
compl X x ≃ compl Y (w x)

  (* uses [funextemptyAxiom] *)
  
X, Y: UU
w: X ≃ Y
x: X
compl X x ≃ compl Y (w x)
 
X, Y: UU
w: X ≃ Y
x: X
compl X x ≃ (∑ x' : X, w x != w x')
X, Y: UU
w: X ≃ Y
x: X
(∑ x' : X, w x != w x') ≃ compl Y (w x)

  
X, Y: UU
w: X ≃ Y
x: X
compl X x ≃ (∑ x' : X, w x != w x')
 
X, Y: UU
w: X ≃ Y
x, x': X
x != x' ≃ w x != w x'
 
X, Y: UU
w: X ≃ Y
x, x': X
x != x' <-> w x != w x'
X, Y: UU
w: X ≃ Y
x, x': X
isaprop (x != x')
X, Y: UU
w: X ≃ Y
x, x': X
isaprop (w x != w x')

    
X, Y: UU
w: X ≃ Y
x, x': X
x != x' <-> w x != w x'
X, Y: UU
w: X ≃ Y
x, x': X
x = x' <-> w x = w x'
 
X, Y: UU
w: X ≃ Y
x, x': X
x = x' ≃ w x = w x'
 apply weqonpaths. 
X, Y: UU
w: X ≃ Y
x, x': X
isaprop (x != x')
X, Y: UU
w: X ≃ Y
x, x': X
isaprop (w x != w x')

    
X, Y: UU
w: X ≃ Y
x, x': X
isaprop (x != x')
apply isapropneg. 
X, Y: UU
w: X ≃ Y
x, x': X
isaprop (w x != w x')

    
X, Y: UU
w: X ≃ Y
x, x': X
isaprop (w x != w x')
apply isapropneg. }
  
X, Y: UU
w: X ≃ Y
x: X
(∑ x' : X, w x != w x') ≃ compl Y (w x)
 refine (weqfp _ _).
Defined.


X, Y: UU
w: X ≃ Y
x: X
∏ x' : compl X x, pr1 (weqoncompl w x x') = w (pr1 x')


X, Y: UU
w: X ≃ Y
x: X
∏ x' : compl X x, pr1 (weqoncompl w x x') = w (pr1 x')

  
X, Y: UU
w: X ≃ Y
x: X
x': compl X x
pr1 (weqoncompl w x x') = w (pr1 x')
 
X, Y: UU
w: X ≃ Y
x, x': X
b: x != x'
pr1 (weqoncompl w x (x',, b)) = w (pr1 (x',, b))
 apply idpath.
Defined.


X, Y, Z: UU
f: X ≃ Y
g: Y ≃ Z
x: X
(weqoncompl g (f x) ∘ weqoncompl f x)%weq ~
weqoncompl (g ∘ f)%weq x


X, Y, Z: UU
f: X ≃ Y
g: Y ≃ Z
x: X
(weqoncompl g (f x) ∘ weqoncompl f x)%weq ~
weqoncompl (g ∘ f)%weq x

  
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X ≃ Y
g: Y ≃ Z
x: X
(weqoncompl g (f x) ∘ weqoncompl f x)%weq ~
weqoncompl (g ∘ f)%weq x
 
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X ≃ Y
g: Y ≃ Z
x: X
x': compl X x
(weqoncompl g (f x) ∘ weqoncompl f x)%weq x' =
weqoncompl (g ∘ f)%weq x x'
 
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X ≃ Y
g: Y ≃ Z
x, x': X
nexx': x != x'
(weqoncompl g (f x) ∘ weqoncompl f x)%weq (x',, nexx') =
weqoncompl (g ∘ f)%weq x (x',, nexx')

  
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X ≃ Y
g: Y ≃ Z
x, x': X
nexx': x != x'
pr1compl Z (g (f x))
  ((weqoncompl g (f x) ∘ weqoncompl f x)%weq
     (x',, nexx')) =
pr1compl Z (g (f x))
  (weqoncompl (g ∘ f)%weq x (x',, nexx'))

  
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X ≃ Y
g: Y ≃ Z
x, x': X
nexx': x != x'
g (f x') = g (f x')
 apply idpath.
Defined.

(** *** Decomposition of a type with an isolated point into two parts [ weqrecompl ] *)

Definition invrecompl (X : UU) (x : X) (is : isisolated X x) :
  X -> coprod (compl X x) unit
  := λ x' : X, match (is x') with
                | ii1 e => ii2 tt
                | ii2 phi => ii1 (make_compl _ _ x' phi)
                end.


X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
isweq (recompl X x)


X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
isweq (recompl X x)

  
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
f:= recompl X x: compl X x ⨿ unit → X
isweq f
 
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
f:= recompl X x: compl X x ⨿ unit → X
g:= invrecompl X x is: X → compl X x ⨿ unit
isweq f

  
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
f:= recompl X x: compl X x ⨿ unit → X
g:= λ x' : X,
match is x' with
| inl _ => inr tt
| inr phi => inl (make_compl X x x' phi)
end: X → compl X x ⨿ unit
isweq f
 
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
f:= recompl X x: compl X x ⨿ unit → X
g:= λ x' : X,
match is x' with
| inl _ => inr tt
| inr phi => inl (make_compl X x x' phi)
end: X → compl X x ⨿ unit
isweq f

  
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
f:= recompl X x: compl X x ⨿ unit → X
g:= λ x' : X,
match is x' with
| inl _ => inr tt
| inr phi => inl (make_compl X x x' phi)
end: X → compl X x ⨿ unit
∏ x' : X, f (g x') = x'
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
f:= recompl X x: compl X x ⨿ unit → X
g:= λ x' : X,
match is x' with
| inl _ => inr tt
| inr phi => inl (make_compl X x x' phi)
end: X → compl X x ⨿ unit
efg: ∏ x' : X, f (g x') = x'
isweq f

x: X
is: isisolated X x
f:= recompl X x: compl X x ⨿ unit → X
g:= λ x' : X,

X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
f:= recompl X x: compl X x ⨿ unit → X
g:= λ x' : X,
match is x' with
| inl _ => inr tt
| inr phi => inl (make_compl X x x' phi)
end: X → compl X x ⨿ unit
recompl X x (g x) = x
 
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
f:= recompl X x: compl X x ⨿ unit → X
g:= λ x' : X,
match is x' with
| inl _ => inr tt
| inr phi => inl (make_compl X x x' phi)
end: X → compl X x ⨿ unit
recompl X x
  match is x with
  | inl _ => inr tt
  | inr phi => inl (make_compl X x x phi)
  end = x
 
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
f:= recompl X x: compl X x ⨿ unit → X
g:= λ x' : X,
match is x' with
| inl _ => inr tt
| inr phi => inl (make_compl X x x' phi)
end: X → compl X x ⨿ unit
recompl X x
  match is x with
  | inl _ => inr tt
  | inr phi => inl (make_compl X x x phi)
  end = x
 
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
f:= recompl X x: compl X x ⨿ unit → X
g:= λ x' : X,
match is x' with
| inl _ => inr tt
| inr phi => inl (make_compl X x x' phi)
end: X → compl X x ⨿ unit
match
  match is x with
  | inl _ => inr tt
  | inr phi => inl (make_compl X x x phi)
  end
with
| inl x0 => pr1compl X x x0
| inr _ => x
end = x
 
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
f:= recompl X x: compl X x ⨿ unit → X
g:= λ x' : X,
match is x' with
| inl _ => inr tt
| inr phi => inl (make_compl X x x' phi)
end: X → compl X x ⨿ unit
match
  match is x with
  | inl _ => inr tt
  | inr phi => inl (make_compl X x x phi)
  end
with
| inl x0 => pr1compl X x x0
| inr _ => x
end = x

      
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
f:= recompl X x: compl X x ⨿ unit → X
g:= λ x' : X,
match is x' with
| inl _ => inr tt
| inr phi => inl (make_compl X x x' phi)
end: X → compl X x ⨿ unit
x0: x = x
x = x
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
f:= recompl X x: compl X x ⨿ unit → X
g:= λ x' : X,
match is x' with
| inl _ => inr tt
| inr phi => inl (make_compl X x x' phi)
end: X → compl X x ⨿ unit
e: x != x
pr1compl X x (make_compl X x x e) = x

      
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
f:= recompl X x: compl X x ⨿ unit → X
g:= λ x' : X,
match is x' with
| inl _ => inr tt
| inr phi => inl (make_compl X x x' phi)
end: X → compl X x ⨿ unit
x0: x = x
x = x
 
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
f:= recompl X x: compl X x ⨿ unit → X
g:= λ x' : X,
match is x' with
| inl _ => inr tt
| inr phi => inl (make_compl X x x' phi)
end: X → compl X x ⨿ unit
x0: x = x
x = x
 apply idpath.
      
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
f:= recompl X x: compl X x ⨿ unit → X
g:= λ x' : X,
match is x' with
| inl _ => inr tt
| inr phi => inl (make_compl X x x' phi)
end: X → compl X x ⨿ unit
e: x != x
pr1compl X x (make_compl X x x e) = x
 induction (e (idpath x)).
    
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
f:= recompl X x: compl X x ⨿ unit → X
g:= λ x' : X,
match is x' with
| inl _ => inr tt
| inr phi => inl (make_compl X x x' phi)
end: X → compl X x ⨿ unit
x': X
e: x != x'
f (g x') = x'
 
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
f:= recompl X x: compl X x ⨿ unit → X
g:= λ x' : X,

| inr phi => inl (make_compl X x x' phi)
end: X → compl X x ⨿ unit
x': X
e: x != x'
recompl X x (g x') = x'
 
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
f:= recompl X x: compl X x ⨿ unit → X
g:= λ x' : X,
match is x' with
| inl _ => inr tt
| inr phi => inl (make_compl X x x' phi)
end: X → compl X x ⨿ unit
x': X
e: x != x'
recompl X x
  match is x' with
  | inl _ => inr tt
  | inr phi => inl (make_compl X x x' phi)
  end = x'

X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
f:= recompl X x: compl X x ⨿ unit → X
g:= λ x' : X,

x: X
is: isisolated X x
f:= recompl X x: compl X x ⨿ unit → X
g:= λ x' : X,
match is x' with
| inl _ => inr tt
| inr phi => inl (make_compl X x x' phi)
end: X → compl X x ⨿ unit

e, e0: x != x'

X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
f:= recompl X x: compl X x ⨿ unit → X
g:= λ x' : X,
match is x' with
| inl _ => inr tt
| inr phi => inl (make_compl X x x' phi)
end: X → compl X x ⨿ unit
x': X
e: x != x'
x0: x = x'
x = x'
 induction (e x0).
      
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
f:= recompl X x: compl X x ⨿ unit → X
g:= λ x' : X,
match is x' with
| inl _ => inr tt

X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
f:= recompl X x: compl X x ⨿ unit → X
g:= λ x' : X,
match is x' with
| inl _ => inr tt
| inr phi => inl (make_compl X x x' phi)
end: X → compl X x ⨿ unit
x': X
e, e0: x != x'
x' = x'
 apply idpath.
  
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
f:= recompl X x: compl X x ⨿ unit → X
g:= λ x' : X,
match is x' with
| inl _ => inr tt
| inr phi => inl (make_compl X x x' phi)
end: X → compl X x ⨿ unit
efg: ∏ x' : X, f (g x') = x'
isweq f

  
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
f:= recompl X x: compl X x ⨿ unit → X
g:= λ x' : X,
match is x' with
| inl _ => inr tt
| inr phi => inl (make_compl X x x' phi)
end: X → compl X x ⨿ unit
efg: ∏ x' : X, f (g x') = x'
∏ u : compl X x ⨿ unit, g (f u) = u

x: X
is: isisolated X x
f:= recompl X x: compl X x ⨿ unit → X
g:= λ x' : X,
match is x' with
| inl _ => inr tt
| inr phi => inl (make_compl X x x' phi)
end: X → compl X x ⨿ unit
efg: ∏ x' : X, f (g x') = x'
egf: ∏ u : compl X x ⨿ unit, g (f u) = u
isweq f

is: isisolated X x
f:= recompl X x: compl X x ⨿ unit → X

∏ u : compl X x ⨿ unit, g (f u) = u

    
X: UU
x: X
is: ∏ x' : X, (x = x') ⨿ (x != x')
f:= recompl X x: compl X x ⨿ unit → X
g:= λ x' : X,

| inl _ => inr tt
| inr phi => inl (make_compl X x x' phi)

∏ u : compl X x ⨿ unit, g (f u) = u

x: X
is: ∏ x' : X, (x = x') ⨿ (x != x')

g:= λ x' : X,

u: compl X x ⨿ unit
g (f u) = u
 
X: UU
x: X
is: ∏ x' : X, (x = x') ⨿ (x != x')
f:= recompl X x: compl X x ⨿ unit → X
g:= λ x' : X,
match is x' with
| inl _ => inr tt
| inr phi => inl (make_compl X x x' phi)
end: X → compl X x ⨿ unit
efg: ∏ x' : X, f (g x') = x'
u: compl X x ⨿ unit
p: x = f u
g (f u) = u

x: X
is: ∏ x' : X, (x = x') ⨿ (x != x')
f:= recompl X x: compl X x ⨿ unit → X

e: x != f u
g (f u) = u

X: UU
x: X
is: ∏ x' : X, (x = x') ⨿ (x != x')
f:= recompl X x: compl X x ⨿ unit → X
g:= λ x' : X,
match is x' with
| inl _ => inr tt
| inr phi => inl (make_compl X x x' phi)
end: X → compl X x ⨿ unit
efg: ∏ x' : X, f (g x') = x'
c: compl X x
p: x = f (inl c)
g (f (inl c)) = inl c
X: UU
x: X
is: ∏ x' : X, (x = x') ⨿ (x != x')
f:= recompl X x: compl X x ⨿ unit → X
g:= λ x' : X,

| inl _ => inr tt

end: X → compl X x ⨿ unit

u: unit
p: x = f (inr u)
g (f (inr u)) = inr u

      
X: UU
x: X
is: ∏ x' : X, (x = x') ⨿ (x != x')
f:= recompl X x: compl X x ⨿ unit → X
g:= λ x' : X,

X: UU
x: X
is: ∏ x' : X, (x = x') ⨿ (x != x')
f:= recompl X x: compl X x ⨿ unit → X
g:= λ x' : X,
match is x' with
| inl _ => inr tt
| inr phi => inl (make_compl X x x' phi)
end: X → compl X x ⨿ unit
efg: ∏ x' : X, f (g x') = x'
c: compl X x
p: x = f (inl c)
g (pr1compl X x c) = inl c
 
X: UU
x: X
is: ∏ x' : X, (x = x') ⨿ (x != x')
f:= recompl X x: compl X x ⨿ unit → X
g:= λ x' : X,
match is x' with
| inl _ => inr tt
| inr phi => inl (make_compl X x x' phi)
end: X → compl X x ⨿ unit
efg: ∏ x' : X, f (g x') = x'
t: X
x0: x != t
p: x = f (inl (t,, x0))
g (pr1compl X x (t,, x0)) = inl (t,, x0)
 
X: UU
x: X
is: ∏ x' : X, (x = x') ⨿ (x != x')
f:= recompl X x: compl X x ⨿ unit → X
g:= λ x' : X,
match is x' with
| inl _ => inr tt
| inr phi => inl (make_compl X x x' phi)
end: X → compl X x ⨿ unit
efg: ∏ x' : X, f (g x') = x'
t: X
x0: x != t
p: x = t
g (pr1compl X x (t,, x0)) = inl (t,, x0)
 induction (x0 p).
      
X: UU
x: X
is: ∏ x' : X, (x = x') ⨿ (x != x')

g:= λ x' : X,

| inr phi => inl (make_compl X x x' phi)
end: X → compl X x ⨿ unit
efg: ∏ x' : X, f (g x') = x'
u: unit
p: x = f (inr u)
g (f (inr u)) = inr u
 
X: UU
x: X
is: ∏ x' : X, (x = x') ⨿ (x != x')
f:= recompl X x: compl X x ⨿ unit → X
g:= λ x' : X,

g (f (inr tt)) = inr tt
 
X: UU
x: X
is: ∏ x' : X, (x = x') ⨿ (x != x')
f:= recompl X x: compl X x ⨿ unit → X
g:= λ x' : X,
match is x' with
| inl _ => inr tt
| inr phi => inl (make_compl X x x' phi)
end: X → compl X x ⨿ unit
efg: ∏ x' : X, f (g x') = x'
p: x = f (inr tt)
g (f (inr tt)) = g x
X: UU
x: X
is: ∏ x' : X, (x = x') ⨿ (x != x')
f:= recompl X x: compl X x ⨿ unit → X
g:= λ x' : X,
match is x' with
| inl _ => inr tt
| inr phi => inl (make_compl X x x' phi)
end: X → compl X x ⨿ unit
efg: ∏ x' : X, f (g x') = x'
p: x = f (inr tt)
e1: g (f (inr tt)) = g x
g (f (inr tt)) = inr tt

        
X: UU
x: X
is: ∏ x' : X, (x = x') ⨿ (x != x')
f:= recompl X x: compl X x ⨿ unit → X
g:= λ x' : X,
match is x' with
| inl _ => inr tt
| inr phi => inl (make_compl X x x' phi)
end: X → compl X x ⨿ unit
efg: ∏ x' : X, f (g x') = x'
p: x = f (inr tt)
e1: g (f (inr tt)) = g x
g (f (inr tt)) = inr tt

        
X: UU
x: X
is: ∏ x' : X, (x = x') ⨿ (x != x')
f:= recompl X x: compl X x ⨿ unit → X
g:= λ x' : X,
match is x' with
| inl _ => inr tt
| inr phi => inl (make_compl X x x' phi)
end: X → compl X x ⨿ unit
efg: ∏ x' : X, f (g x') = x'
p: x = f (inr tt)
e1: g (f (inr tt)) = g x
g x = inr tt
X: UU
x: X
is: ∏ x' : X, (x = x') ⨿ (x != x')
f:= recompl X x: compl X x ⨿ unit → X
g:= λ x' : X,
match is x' with
| inl _ => inr tt
| inr phi => inl (make_compl X x x' phi)
end: X → compl X x ⨿ unit
efg: ∏ x' : X, f (g x') = x'
p: x = f (inr tt)
e1: g (f (inr tt)) = g x
e2: g x = inr tt
g (f (inr tt)) = inr tt

        
X: UU
x: X
is: ∏ x' : X, (x = x') ⨿ (x != x')
f:= recompl X x: compl X x ⨿ unit → X
g:= λ x' : X,
match is x' with
| inl _ => inr tt
| inr phi => inl (make_compl X x x' phi)
end: X → compl X x ⨿ unit
efg: ∏ x' : X, f (g x') = x'
p: x = f (inr tt)
e1: g (f (inr tt)) = g x
g x = inr tt

          
X: UU
x: X
is: ∏ x' : X, (x = x') ⨿ (x != x')
f:= recompl X x: compl X x ⨿ unit → X
g:= λ x' : X,
match is x' with
| inl _ => inr tt
| inr phi => inl (make_compl X x x' phi)
end: X → compl X x ⨿ unit
efg: ∏ x' : X, f (g x') = x'
p: x = f (inr tt)
e1: g (f (inr tt)) = g x
match is x with
| inl _ => inr tt
| inr phi => inl (make_compl X x x phi)
end = inr tt
 
X: UU
x: X
is: ∏ x' : X, (x = x') ⨿ (x != x')
f:= recompl X x: compl X x ⨿ unit → X
g:= λ x' : X,
match is x' with
| inl _ => inr tt
| inr phi => inl (make_compl X x x' phi)
end: X → compl X x ⨿ unit
efg: ∏ x' : X, f (g x') = x'
p: x = f (inr tt)
e1: g (f (inr tt)) = g x
i: x = x
inr tt = inr tt
X: UU
x: X
is: ∏ x' : X, (x = x') ⨿ (x != x')
f:= recompl X x: compl X x ⨿ unit → X
g:= λ x' : X,
match is x' with
| inl _ => inr tt
| inr phi => inl (make_compl X x x' phi)
end: X → compl X x ⨿ unit
efg: ∏ x' : X, f (g x') = x'
p: x = f (inr tt)
e1: g (f (inr tt)) = g x
e: x != x
inl (make_compl X x x e) = inr tt

          
X: UU
x: X
is: ∏ x' : X, (x = x') ⨿ (x != x')
f:= recompl X x: compl X x ⨿ unit → X
g:= λ x' : X,
match is x' with
| inl _ => inr tt
| inr phi => inl (make_compl X x x' phi)
end: X → compl X x ⨿ unit
efg: ∏ x' : X, f (g x') = x'
p: x = f (inr tt)
e1: g (f (inr tt)) = g x
e: x != x
inl (make_compl X x x e) = inr tt

          induction (e (idpath x)).
        
X: UU
x: X
is: ∏ x' : X, (x = x') ⨿ (x != x')
f:= recompl X x: compl X x ⨿ unit → X
g:= λ x' : X,
match is x' with
| inl _ => inr tt
| inr phi => inl (make_compl X x x' phi)
end: X → compl X x ⨿ unit
efg: ∏ x' : X, f (g x') = x'
p: x = f (inr tt)
e1: g (f (inr tt)) = g x
e2: g x = inr tt
g (f (inr tt)) = inr tt

        apply (pathscomp0 e1 e2).
    
X: UU
x: X
is: ∏ x' : X, (x = x') ⨿ (x != x')
f:= recompl X x: compl X x ⨿ unit → X
g:= λ x' : X,

| inr phi => inl (make_compl X x x' phi)
end: X → compl X x ⨿ unit
efg: ∏ x' : X, f (g x') = x'
u: compl X x ⨿ unit
e: x != f u
g (f u) = u

is: ∏ x' : X, (x = x') ⨿ (x != x')

e: x != f (inl (t,, x0))
e0: x != t
inl (make_compl X x t e0) = inl (t,, x0)
X: UU
x: X
is: ∏ x' : X, (x = x') ⨿ (x != x')
f:= recompl X x: compl X x ⨿ unit → X
g:= λ x' : X,
match is x' with
| inl _ => inr tt
| inr phi => inl (make_compl X x x' phi)
end: X → compl X x ⨿ unit
efg: ∏ x' : X, f (g x') = x'
u: unit
e: x != f (inr u)
g (f (inr u)) = inr u

is: ∏ x' : X, (x = x') ⨿ (x != x')
f:= recompl X x: compl X x ⨿ unit → X
g:= λ x' : X,
match is x' with
| inl _ => inr tt
| inr phi => inl (make_compl X x x' phi)
end: X → compl X x ⨿ unit
efg: ∏ x' : X, f (g x') = x'
t: X
x0: x != t
e: x != f (inl (t,, x0))
e0: x != t
inl (make_compl X x t e0) = inl (t,, x0)

end: X → compl X x ⨿ unit
efg: ∏ x' : X, f (g x') = x'
u: unit
e: x != f (inr u)
g (f (inr u)) = inr u

X: UU
x: X
is: ∏ x' : X, (x = x') ⨿ (x != x')
f:= recompl X x: compl X x ⨿ unit → X
g:= λ x' : X,
match is x' with
| inl _ => inr tt
| inr phi => inl (make_compl X x x' phi)
end: X → compl X x ⨿ unit
efg: ∏ x' : X, f (g x') = x'
u: unit
e: x != f (inr u)
g (recompl X x (inr u)) = inr u
 
X: UU
x: X
is: ∏ x' : X, (x = x') ⨿ (x != x')
f:= recompl X x: compl X x ⨿ unit → X
g:= λ x' : X,
match is x' with
| inl _ => inr tt
| inr phi => inl (make_compl X x x' phi)
end: X → compl X x ⨿ unit
efg: ∏ x' : X, f (g x') = x'
u: unit
e: x != f (inr u)
match is (recompl X x (inr u)) with
| inl _ => inr tt
| inr phi =>
    inl (make_compl X x (recompl X x (inr u)) phi)
end = inr u

x: X
is: ∏ x' : X, (x = x') ⨿ (x != x')

g:= λ x' : X,

end: X → compl X x ⨿ unit

u: unit
e: x != f (inr u)
match is x with
| inl _ => inr tt
| inr phi => inl (make_compl X x x phi)
end = inr u
 
X: UU
x: X
is: ∏ x' : X, (x = x') ⨿ (x != x')
f:= recompl X x: compl X x ⨿ unit → X
g:= λ x' : X,
match is x' with
| inl _ => inr tt
| inr phi => inl (make_compl X x x' phi)
end: X → compl X x ⨿ unit
efg: ∏ x' : X, f (g x') = x'
e: x != f (inr tt)
match is x with
| inl _ => inr tt
| inr phi => inl (make_compl X x x phi)
end = inr tt

x: X
is: ∏ x' : X, (x = x') ⨿ (x != x')
f:= recompl X x: compl X x ⨿ unit → X
g:= λ x' : X,

| inl _ => inr tt

end: X → compl X x ⨿ unit
efg: ∏ x' : X, f (g x') = x'
e: x != f (inr tt)
a: x = x
inr tt = inr tt
X: UU
x: X
is: ∏ x' : X, (x = x') ⨿ (x != x')
f:= recompl X x: compl X x ⨿ unit → X
g:= λ x' : X,
match is x' with
| inl _ => inr tt
| inr phi => inl (make_compl X x x' phi)
end: X → compl X x ⨿ unit
efg: ∏ x' : X, f (g x') = x'
e: x != f (inr tt)
b: x != x
inl (make_compl X x x b) = inr tt

      
X: UU
x: X
is: ∏ x' : X, (x = x') ⨿ (x != x')
f:= recompl X x: compl X x ⨿ unit → X
g:= λ x' : X,
match is x' with
| inl _ => inr tt
| inr phi => inl (make_compl X x x' phi)
end: X → compl X x ⨿ unit
efg: ∏ x' : X, f (g x') = x'
e: x != f (inr tt)
a: x = x
inr tt = inr tt
 apply idpath.
      
X: UU
x: X
is: ∏ x' : X, (x = x') ⨿ (x != x')
f:= recompl X x: compl X x ⨿ unit → X
g:= λ x' : X,
match is x' with
| inl _ => inr tt
| inr phi => inl (make_compl X x x' phi)
end: X → compl X x ⨿ unit
efg: ∏ x' : X, f (g x') = x'
e: x != f (inr tt)
b: x != x
inl (make_compl X x x b) = inr tt
 induction (e (idpath x)).
  
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
f:= recompl X x: compl X x ⨿ unit → X
g:= λ x' : X,
match is x' with
| inl _ => inr tt
| inr phi => inl (make_compl X x x' phi)
end: X → compl X x ⨿ unit
efg: ∏ x' : X, f (g x') = x'
egf: ∏ u : compl X x ⨿ unit, g (f u) = u
isweq f

  apply (isweq_iso f g egf efg).
Defined.

Definition weqrecompl (X : UU) (x : X) (is : isisolated _ x) :
  compl X x ⨿ unit ≃ X := make_weq _ (isweqrecompl X x is).

(** *** Theorem saying that [ recompl ] commutes up to homotopy with [ maponcomplweq ] *)


X, Y: UU
w: X ≃ Y
x: X
a: compl X x ⨿ unit
recompl Y (w x)
  (coprodf (weqoncompl w x) (idfun unit) a) =
w (recompl X x a)


X, Y: UU
w: X ≃ Y
x: X
a: compl X x ⨿ unit
recompl Y (w x)
  (coprodf (weqoncompl w x) (idfun unit) a) =
w (recompl X x a)

  
X, Y: UU
w: X ≃ Y
x: X
a: compl X x ⨿ unit
recompl Y (w x)
  (coprodf (weqoncompl w x) (idfun unit) a) =
w (recompl X x a)
 
X, Y: UU
w: X ≃ Y
x: X
ane: compl X x
recompl Y (w x)
  (coprodf (weqoncompl w x) (idfun unit) (inl ane)) =
w (recompl X x (inl ane))
X, Y: UU
w: X ≃ Y
x: X
t: unit
recompl Y (w x)
  (coprodf (weqoncompl w x) (idfun unit) (inr t)) =
w (recompl X x (inr t))
 
X, Y: UU
w: X ≃ Y
x, a: X
ne: x != a
recompl Y (w x)
  (coprodf (weqoncompl w x) (idfun unit)
     (inl (a,, ne))) = w (recompl X x (inl (a,, ne)))
X, Y: UU
w: X ≃ Y
x: X
t: unit
recompl Y (w x)
  (coprodf (weqoncompl w x) (idfun unit) (inr t)) =
w (recompl X x (inr t))
 
X, Y: UU
w: X ≃ Y
x, a: X
ne: x != a
w a = w a
X, Y: UU
w: X ≃ Y
x: X
t: unit
recompl Y (w x)
  (coprodf (weqoncompl w x) (idfun unit) (inr t)) =
w (recompl X x (inr t))

  
X, Y: UU
w: X ≃ Y
x: X
t: unit
recompl Y (w x)
  (coprodf (weqoncompl w x) (idfun unit) (inr t)) =
w (recompl X x (inr t))
 
X, Y: UU
w: X ≃ Y
x: X
recompl Y (w x)
  (coprodf (weqoncompl w x) (idfun unit) (inr tt)) =
w (recompl X x (inr tt))
 
X, Y: UU
w: X ≃ Y
x: X
w x = w x
 apply idpath.
Defined.



(** *** Recomplement on functions *)


Definition recomplf {X Y : UU} (x : X) (y : Y) (isx : isisolated X x)
           (f : compl X x -> compl Y y) : X -> Y
  := funcomp (funcomp (invmap (weqrecompl X x isx)) (coprodf f (idfun unit)))
             (recompl Y y).

Definition weqrecomplf {X Y : UU} (x : X) (y : Y) (isx : isisolated X x)
           (isy : isisolated Y y) (w : (compl X x) ≃ (compl Y y)) : X ≃ Y
  := weqcomp (weqcomp (invweq (weqrecompl X x isx)) (weqcoprodf w (idweq unit)))
             (weqrecompl Y y isy).


X, Y: UU
x: X
y: Y
isx: isisolated X x
f, f': compl X x → compl Y y
h: f ~ f'
recomplf x y isx f ~ recomplf x y isx f'


X, Y: UU
x: X
y: Y
isx: isisolated X x
f, f': compl X x → compl Y y
h: f ~ f'
recomplf x y isx f ~ recomplf x y isx f'

  
X, Y: UU
x: X
y: Y
isx: isisolated X x
f, f': compl X x → compl Y y
h: f ~ f'
recomplf x y isx f ~ recomplf x y isx f'
 
X, Y: UU
x: X
y: Y
isx: isisolated X x
f, f': compl X x → compl Y y
h: f ~ f'
a: X
recomplf x y isx f a = recomplf x y isx f' a
 
X, Y: UU
x: X
y: Y
isx: isisolated X x
f, f': compl X x → compl Y y
h: f ~ f'
a: X
(recompl Y y
 ∘ (coprodf f (idfun unit)
    ∘ invmap (weqrecompl X x isx))) a =
(recompl Y y
 ∘ (coprodf f' (idfun unit)
    ∘ invmap (weqrecompl X x isx))) a

  apply (maponpaths (recompl Y y)
                    (homotcoprodfhomot _ _ _ _ h (λ t : unit, idpath t)
                                       (invmap (weqrecompl X x isx) a))).
Defined.


X, Y: UU
x: X
y: Y
isx: isisolated X x
f: compl X x → compl Y y
recomplf x y isx f x = y


X, Y: UU
x: X
y: Y
isx: isisolated X x
f: compl X x → compl Y y
recomplf x y isx f x = y

  
X, Y: UU
x: X
y: Y
isx: isisolated X x
f: compl X x → compl Y y
recomplf x y isx f x = y
 
X, Y: UU
x: X
y: Y
isx: isisolated X x
f: compl X x → compl Y y
(recompl Y y
 ∘ (coprodf f (idfun unit)
    ∘ invmap (weqrecompl X x isx))) x = y
 
X, Y: UU
x: X
y: Y
isx: isisolated X x
f: compl X x → compl Y y
(recompl Y y
 ∘ (coprodf f (idfun unit)
    ∘ invmap
        (make_weq (recompl X x) (isweqrecompl X x isx))))
  x = y
 
X, Y: UU
x: X
y: Y
isx: isisolated X x
f: compl X x → compl Y y
(recompl Y y
 ∘ (coprodf f (idfun unit)
    ∘ (λ y : X,
       hfiberpr1
         (make_weq (recompl X x)
            (isweqrecompl X x isx)) y
         (weqccontrhfiber
            (make_weq (recompl X x)
               (isweqrecompl X x isx)) y)))) x = y
 
X, Y: UU
x: X
y: Y
isx: isisolated X x
f: compl X x → compl Y y
recompl Y y
  (coprodf f (idfun unit) (invrecompl X x isx x)) = y

  
X, Y: UU
x: X
y: Y
isx: isisolated X x
f: compl X x → compl Y y
recompl Y y
  (coprodf f (idfun unit)
     match isx x with
     | inl _ => inr tt
     | inr phi => inl (make_compl X x x phi)
     end) = y
 
X, Y: UU
x: X
y: Y
isx: isisolated X x
f: compl X x → compl Y y
i1: x = x
recompl Y y (coprodf f (idfun unit) (inr tt)) = y
X, Y: UU
x: X
y: Y
isx: isisolated X x
f: compl X x → compl Y y
i2: x != x
recompl Y y
  (coprodf f (idfun unit) (inl (make_compl X x x i2))) =
y

  
X, Y: UU
x: X
y: Y
isx: isisolated X x
f: compl X x → compl Y y
i1: x = x
recompl Y y (coprodf f (idfun unit) (inr tt)) = y
 
X, Y: UU
x: X
y: Y
isx: isisolated X x
f: compl X x → compl Y y
i1: x = x
y = y
 apply idpath.
  
X, Y: UU
x: X
y: Y
isx: isisolated X x
f: compl X x → compl Y y
i2: x != x
recompl Y y
  (coprodf f (idfun unit) (inl (make_compl X x x i2))) =
y
 induction (i2 (idpath _)).
Defined.


X, Y, Z: UU
x: X
y: Y
z: Z
isx: isisolated X x
isy: isisolated Y y
f: compl X x → compl Y y
g: compl Y y → compl Z z
recomplf y z isy g ∘ recomplf x y isx f ~
recomplf x z isx (g ∘ f)


X, Y, Z: UU
x: X
y: Y
z: Z
isx: isisolated X x
isy: isisolated Y y
f: compl X x → compl Y y
g: compl Y y → compl Z z
recomplf y z isy g ∘ recomplf x y isx f ~
recomplf x z isx (g ∘ f)

  
X, Y, Z: UU
x: X
y: Y
z: Z
isx: isisolated X x
isy: isisolated Y y
f: compl X x → compl Y y
g: compl Y y → compl Z z
recomplf y z isy g ∘ recomplf x y isx f ~
recomplf x z isx (g ∘ f)
 
X, Y, Z: UU
x: X
y: Y
z: Z
isx: isisolated X x
isy: isisolated Y y
f: compl X x → compl Y y
g: compl Y y → compl Z z
x': X
(recomplf y z isy g ∘ recomplf x y isx f) x' =
recomplf x z isx (g ∘ f) x'
 
X, Y, Z: UU
x: X
y: Y
z: Z
isx: isisolated X x
isy: isisolated Y y
f: compl X x → compl Y y
g: compl Y y → compl Z z
x': X
(recompl Z z
 ∘ (coprodf g (idfun unit)
    ∘ invmap (weqrecompl Y y isy))
 ∘ (recompl Y y
    ∘ (coprodf f (idfun unit)
       ∘ invmap (weqrecompl X x isx)))) x' =
(recompl Z z
 ∘ (coprodf (g ∘ f) (idfun unit)
    ∘ invmap (weqrecompl X x isx))) x'

  
X, Y, Z: UU
x: X
y: Y
z: Z
isx: isisolated X x
isy: isisolated Y y
f: compl X x → compl Y y
g: compl Y y → compl Z z
x': X
e:= homotinvweqweq (weqrecompl Y y isy)
  (coprodf f (idfun unit)
     (invmap (weqrecompl X x isx) x')): invmap (weqrecompl Y y isy)
  (weqrecompl Y y isy
     (coprodf f (idfun unit)
        (invmap (weqrecompl X x isx) x'))) =
coprodf f (idfun unit)
  (invmap (weqrecompl X x isx) x')
(recompl Z z
 ∘ (coprodf g (idfun unit)
    ∘ invmap (weqrecompl Y y isy))
 ∘ (recompl Y y
    ∘ (coprodf f (idfun unit)
       ∘ invmap (weqrecompl X x isx)))) x' =
(recompl Z z
 ∘ (coprodf (g ∘ f) (idfun unit)
    ∘ invmap (weqrecompl X x isx))) x'

  
X, Y, Z: UU
x: X
y: Y
z: Z
isx: isisolated X x
isy: isisolated Y y
f: compl X x → compl Y y
g: compl Y y → compl Z z
x': X
e:= homotinvweqweq (weqrecompl Y y isy)
  (coprodf f (idfun unit)
     (invmap (weqrecompl X x isx) x')): invmap (weqrecompl Y y isy)
  (recompl Y y
     (coprodf f (idfun unit)
        (invmap (weqrecompl X x isx) x'))) =
coprodf f (idfun unit)
  (invmap (weqrecompl X x isx) x')
(recompl Z z
 ∘ (coprodf g (idfun unit)
    ∘ invmap (weqrecompl Y y isy))
 ∘ (recompl Y y
    ∘ (coprodf f (idfun unit)
       ∘ invmap (weqrecompl X x isx)))) x' =
(recompl Z z
 ∘ (coprodf (g ∘ f) (idfun unit)
    ∘ invmap (weqrecompl X x isx))) x'
 
X, Y, Z: UU
x: X
y: Y
z: Z
isx: isisolated X x
isy: isisolated Y y
f: compl X x → compl Y y
g: compl Y y → compl Z z
x': X
e:= homotinvweqweq (weqrecompl Y y isy)
  (coprodf f (idfun unit)
     (invmap (weqrecompl X x isx) x')): invmap (weqrecompl Y y isy)
  (recompl Y y
     (coprodf f (idfun unit)
        (invmap (weqrecompl X x isx) x'))) =
coprodf f (idfun unit)
  (invmap (weqrecompl X x isx) x')
recompl Z z
  (coprodf g (idfun unit)
     (invmap (weqrecompl Y y isy)
        (recompl Y y
           (coprodf f (idfun unit)
              (invmap (weqrecompl X x isx) x'))))) =
recompl Z z
  (coprodf (g ∘ f) (idfun unit)
     (invmap (weqrecompl X x isx) x'))
 
X, Y, Z: UU
x: X
y: Y
z: Z
isx: isisolated X x
isy: isisolated Y y
f: compl X x → compl Y y
g: compl Y y → compl Z z
x': X
e:= homotinvweqweq (weqrecompl Y y isy)
  (coprodf f (idfun unit)
     (invmap (weqrecompl X x isx) x')): invmap (weqrecompl Y y isy)
  (recompl Y y
     (coprodf f (idfun unit)
        (invmap (weqrecompl X x isx) x'))) =
coprodf f (idfun unit)
  (invmap (weqrecompl X x isx) x')
recompl Z z
  (coprodf g (idfun unit)
     (coprodf f (idfun unit)
        (invmap (weqrecompl X x isx) x'))) =
recompl Z z
  (coprodf (g ∘ f) (idfun unit)
     (invmap (weqrecompl X x isx) x'))

  
X, Y, Z: UU
x: X
y: Y
z: Z
isx: isisolated X x
isy: isisolated Y y
f: compl X x → compl Y y
g: compl Y y → compl Z z
x': X
e:= homotinvweqweq (weqrecompl Y y isy)
  (coprodf f (idfun unit)
     (invmap (weqrecompl X x isx) x')): invmap (weqrecompl Y y isy)
  (recompl Y y
     (coprodf f (idfun unit)
        (invmap (weqrecompl X x isx) x'))) =
coprodf f (idfun unit)
  (invmap (weqrecompl X x isx) x')
e':= homotcoprodfcomp f (idfun unit) g (idfun unit)
  (invmap (weqrecompl X x isx) x'): (coprodf g (idfun unit) ∘ coprodf f (idfun unit))
  (invmap (weqrecompl X x isx) x') =
coprodf (g ∘ f) (idfun unit ∘ idfun unit)
  (invmap (weqrecompl X x isx) x')
recompl Z z
  (coprodf g (idfun unit)
     (coprodf f (idfun unit)
        (invmap (weqrecompl X x isx) x'))) =
recompl Z z
  (coprodf (g ∘ f) (idfun unit)
     (invmap (weqrecompl X x isx) x'))

  
X, Y, Z: UU
x: X
y: Y
z: Z
isx: isisolated X x
isy: isisolated Y y
f: compl X x → compl Y y
g: compl Y y → compl Z z
x': X
e:= homotinvweqweq (weqrecompl Y y isy)
  (coprodf f (idfun unit)
     (invmap (weqrecompl X x isx) x')): invmap (weqrecompl Y y isy)
  (recompl Y y
     (coprodf f (idfun unit)
        (invmap (weqrecompl X x isx) x'))) =
coprodf f (idfun unit)
  (invmap (weqrecompl X x isx) x')
e':= homotcoprodfcomp f (idfun unit) g (idfun unit)
  (invmap (weqrecompl X x isx) x'): coprodf g (idfun unit)
  (coprodf f (idfun unit)
     (invmap (weqrecompl X x isx) x')) =
coprodf (g ∘ f) (idfun unit ∘ idfun unit)
  (invmap (weqrecompl X x isx) x')
recompl Z z
  (coprodf g (idfun unit)
     (coprodf f (idfun unit)
        (invmap (weqrecompl X x isx) x'))) =
recompl Z z
  (coprodf (g ∘ f) (idfun unit)
     (invmap (weqrecompl X x isx) x'))
 
X, Y, Z: UU
x: X
y: Y
z: Z
isx: isisolated X x
isy: isisolated Y y
f: compl X x → compl Y y
g: compl Y y → compl Z z
x': X
e:= homotinvweqweq (weqrecompl Y y isy)
  (coprodf f (idfun unit)
     (invmap (weqrecompl X x isx) x')): invmap (weqrecompl Y y isy)
  (recompl Y y
     (coprodf f (idfun unit)
        (invmap (weqrecompl X x isx) x'))) =
coprodf f (idfun unit)
  (invmap (weqrecompl X x isx) x')
e':= homotcoprodfcomp f (idfun unit) g (idfun unit)
  (invmap (weqrecompl X x isx) x'): coprodf g (idfun unit)
  (coprodf f (idfun unit)
     (invmap (weqrecompl X x isx) x')) =
coprodf (g ∘ f) (idfun unit ∘ idfun unit)
  (invmap (weqrecompl X x isx) x')
recompl Z z
  (coprodf (g ∘ f) (idfun unit ∘ idfun unit)
     (invmap (weqrecompl X x isx) x')) =
recompl Z z
  (coprodf (g ∘ f) (idfun unit)
     (invmap (weqrecompl X x isx) x'))
 apply idpath.
Defined.



X: UU
x: X
isx: isisolated X x
recomplf x x isx (idfun (compl X x)) ~ idfun X


X: UU
x: X
isx: isisolated X x
recomplf x x isx (idfun (compl X x)) ~ idfun X

  
X: UU
x: X
isx: isisolated X x
recomplf x x isx (idfun (compl X x)) ~ idfun X
 
X: UU
x: X
isx: isisolated X x
x': X
recomplf x x isx (idfun (compl X x)) x' = idfun X x'
 
X: UU
x: X
isx: isisolated X x
x': X
(recompl X x
 ∘ (coprodf (idfun (compl X x)) (idfun unit)
    ∘ invmap (weqrecompl X x isx))) x' = idfun X x'
 
X: UU
x: X
isx: isisolated X x
x': X
(recompl X x
 ∘ (coprodf (idfun (compl X x)) (idfun unit)
    ∘ invmap
        (make_weq (recompl X x) (isweqrecompl X x isx))))
  x' = idfun X x'
 
X: UU
x: X
isx: isisolated X x
x': X
(recompl X x
 ∘ (coprodf (idfun (compl X x)) (idfun unit)
    ∘ (λ y : X,
       hfiberpr1
         (make_weq (recompl X x)
            (isweqrecompl X x isx)) y
         (weqccontrhfiber
            (make_weq (recompl X x)
               (isweqrecompl X x isx)) y)))) x' =
idfun X x'
 
X: UU
x: X
isx: isisolated X x
x': X
recompl X x
  (coprodf (idfun (compl X x)) (idfun unit)
     (invrecompl X x isx x')) = x'

  
X: UU
x: X
isx: isisolated X x
x': X
recompl X x
  (coprodf (idfun (compl X x)) (idfun unit)
     match isx x' with
     | inl _ => inr tt
     | inr phi => inl (make_compl X x x' phi)
     end) = x'
 
X: UU
x: X
isx: isisolated X x
x': X
e: x = x'
recompl X x
  (coprodf (idfun (compl X x)) (idfun unit) (inr tt)) =
x'
X: UU
x: X
isx: isisolated X x
x': X
ne: x != x'
recompl X x
  (coprodf (idfun (compl X x)) (idfun unit)
     (inl (make_compl X x x' ne))) = x'

  
X: UU
x: X
isx: isisolated X x
x': X
e: x = x'
recompl X x
  (coprodf (idfun (compl X x)) (idfun unit) (inr tt)) =
x'
 
X: UU
x: X
isx: isisolated X x
x': X
e: x = x'
x = x'
 apply e.
  
X: UU
x: X
isx: isisolated X x
x': X
ne: x != x'
recompl X x
  (coprodf (idfun (compl X x)) (idfun unit)
     (inl (make_compl X x x' ne))) = x'
 
X: UU
x: X
isx: isisolated X x
x': X
ne: x != x'
x' = x'
 apply idpath.
Defined.




X, Y: UU
x: X
y: Y
isx: isisolated X x
f: compl X x → compl Y y
x'n: compl X x
y'n: compl Y y
e: recomplf x y isx f (pr1 x'n) = pr1 y'n
f x'n = y'n


X, Y: UU
x: X
y: Y
isx: isisolated X x
f: compl X x → compl Y y
x'n: compl X x
y'n: compl Y y
e: recomplf x y isx f (pr1 x'n) = pr1 y'n
f x'n = y'n

  
X, Y: UU
x: X
y: Y
isx: isisolated X x
f: compl X x → compl Y y
x'n: compl X x
y'n: compl Y y
e: recomplf x y isx f (pr1 x'n) = pr1 y'n
f x'n = y'n
 
X, Y: UU
x: X
y: Y
isx: isisolated X x
f: compl X x → compl Y y
x': X
nexx': x != x'
y'n: compl Y y
e: recomplf x y isx f (pr1 (x',, nexx')) = pr1 y'n
f (x',, nexx') = y'n
 
X, Y: UU
x: X
y: Y
isx: isisolated X x
f: compl X x → compl Y y
x': X
nexx': x != x'
y': Y
neyy': y != y'
e: recomplf x y isx f (pr1 (x',, nexx')) =
pr1 (y',, neyy')
f (x',, nexx') = y',, neyy'

  
X, Y: UU
x: X
y: Y
isx: isisolated X x
f: compl X x → compl Y y
x': X
nexx': x != x'
y': Y
neyy': y != y'
e: recomplf x y isx f x' = y'
f (x',, nexx') = y',, neyy'
 
X, Y: UU
x: X
y: Y
isx: isisolated X x
f: compl X x → compl Y y
x': X
nexx': x != x'
y': Y
neyy': y != y'
e: recomplf x y isx f x' = y'
pr1compl Y y (f (x',, nexx')) =
pr1compl Y y (y',, neyy')
 
X, Y: UU
x: X
y: Y
isx: isisolated X x
f: compl X x → compl Y y
x': X
nexx': x != x'
y': Y
neyy': y != y'
e: recomplf x y isx f x' = y'
pr1compl Y y (f (x',, nexx')) = y'

  
X, Y: UU
x: X
y: Y
isx: isisolated X x
f: compl X x → compl Y y
x': X
nexx': x != x'
y': Y
neyy': y != y'
e: recomplf x y isx f x' = y'
pr1compl Y y (f (x',, nexx')) = recomplf x y isx f x'
 
X, Y: UU
x: X
y: Y
isx: isisolated X x
f: compl X x → compl Y y
x': X
nexx': x != x'
y': Y
neyy': y != y'
e: recomplf x y isx f x' = y'
pr1compl Y y (f (x',, nexx')) =
(recompl Y y
 ∘ (coprodf f (idfun unit)
    ∘ invmap (weqrecompl X x isx))) x'
 
X, Y: UU
x: X
y: Y
isx: isisolated X x
f: compl X x → compl Y y
x': X
nexx': x != x'
y': Y
neyy': y != y'
e: recomplf x y isx f x' = y'
pr1compl Y y (f (x',, nexx')) =
(recompl Y y
 ∘ (coprodf f (idfun unit)
    ∘ (λ y : X,
       hfiberpr1 (weqrecompl X x isx) y
         (weqccontrhfiber (weqrecompl X x isx) y))))
  x'
 
X, Y: UU
x: X
y: Y
isx: isisolated X x
f: compl X x → compl Y y
x': X
nexx': x != x'
y': Y
neyy': y != y'
e: recomplf x y isx f x' = y'
pr1compl Y y (f (x',, nexx')) =
(recompl Y y
 ∘ ((λ xy : compl X x ⨿ unit,
     match xy with
     | inl x => inl (f x)
     | inr y0 => inr (idfun unit y0)
     end)
    ∘ (λ y : X,
       hfiberpr1 (weqrecompl X x isx) y
         (weqccontrhfiber (weqrecompl X x isx) y))))
  x'

  
X, Y: UU
x: X
y: Y
isx: isisolated X x
f: compl X x → compl Y y
x': X
nexx': x != x'
y': Y
neyy': y != y'
e: recomplf x y isx f x' = y'
pr1compl Y y (f (x',, nexx')) =
recompl Y y
  match invrecompl X x isx x' with
  | inl x => inl (f x)
  | inr y0 => inr y0
  end
 
X, Y: UU
x: X
y: Y
isx: isisolated X x
f: compl X x → compl Y y
x': X
nexx': x != x'
y': Y
neyy': y != y'
e: recomplf x y isx f x' = y'
pr1compl Y y (f (x',, nexx')) =
recompl Y y
  match
    match isx x' with
    | inl _ => inr tt
    | inr phi => inl (make_compl X x x' phi)
    end
  with
  | inl x => inl (f x)
  | inr y0 => inr y0
  end

  
X, Y: UU
x: X
y: Y
isx: isisolated X x
f: compl X x → compl Y y
x': X
nexx': x != x'
y': Y
neyy': y != y'
e: recomplf x y isx f x' = y'
exx': x = x'
pr1compl Y y (f (x',, nexx')) = recompl Y y (inr tt)
X, Y: UU
x: X
y: Y
isx: isisolated X x
f: compl X x → compl Y y
x': X
nexx': x != x'
y': Y
neyy': y != y'
e: recomplf x y isx f x' = y'
nexx'': x != x'
pr1compl Y y (f (x',, nexx')) =
recompl Y y (inl (f (make_compl X x x' nexx'')))

  
X, Y: UU
x: X
y: Y
isx: isisolated X x
f: compl X x → compl Y y
x': X
nexx': x != x'
y': Y
neyy': y != y'
e: recomplf x y isx f x' = y'
exx': x = x'
pr1compl Y y (f (x',, nexx')) = recompl Y y (inr tt)
 induction (nexx' exx').
  
X, Y: UU
x: X
y: Y
isx: isisolated X x
f: compl X x → compl Y y
x': X
nexx': x != x'
y': Y
neyy': y != y'
e: recomplf x y isx f x' = y'
nexx'': x != x'
pr1compl Y y (f (x',, nexx')) =
recompl Y y (inl (f (make_compl X x x' nexx'')))
 
X, Y: UU
x: X
y: Y
isx: isisolated X x
f: compl X x → compl Y y
x': X
nexx': x != x'
y': Y
neyy': y != y'
e: recomplf x y isx f x' = y'
nexx'': x != x'
pr1compl Y y (f (x',, nexx')) =
pr1compl Y y (f (make_compl X x x' nexx''))
 
X, Y: UU
x: X
y: Y
isx: isisolated X x
f: compl X x → compl Y y
x': X
nexx': x != x'
y': Y
neyy': y != y'
e: recomplf x y isx f x' = y'
nexx'': x != x'
nexx' = nexx''
X, Y: UU
x: X
y: Y
isx: isisolated X x
f: compl X x → compl Y y
x': X
nexx': x != x'
y': Y
neyy': y != y'
e: recomplf x y isx f x' = y'
nexx'': x != x'
ee: nexx' = nexx''
pr1compl Y y (f (x',, nexx')) =
pr1compl Y y (f (make_compl X x x' nexx''))

    
X, Y: UU
x: X
y: Y
isx: isisolated X x
f: compl X x → compl Y y
x': X
nexx': x != x'
y': Y
neyy': y != y'
e: recomplf x y isx f x' = y'
nexx'': x != x'
ee: nexx' = nexx''
pr1compl Y y (f (x',, nexx')) =
pr1compl Y y (f (make_compl X x x' nexx''))

    
X, Y: UU
x: X
y: Y
isx: isisolated X x
f: compl X x → compl Y y
x': X
nexx': x != x'
y': Y
neyy': y != y'
e: recomplf x y isx f x' = y'
nexx'': x != x'
ee: nexx' = nexx''
pr1compl Y y (f (x',, nexx'')) =
pr1compl Y y (f (make_compl X x x' nexx''))
 apply idpath.
Defined.





(** *** Equivalence between [ compl T t1 ] and [ compl T t2 ] for isolated [ t1 t2 ] *)

Definition funtranspos0 {T: UU} (t1 t2 : T) (is2 : isisolated T t2)
           (x : compl T t1) : compl T t2
  := match (is2 (pr1 x)) with
     | ii1 e =>
       match (is2 t1) with
       | ii1 e' => fromempty (pr2 x (pathscomp0 (pathsinv0 e') e))
       | ii2 ne' => make_compl T t2 t1 ne' end
     | ii2 ne => make_compl T t2 (pr1 x) ne end.


T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
funtranspos0 t2 t1 is1 ∘ funtranspos0 t1 t2 is2 ~
idfun (compl T t1)


T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
funtranspos0 t2 t1 is1 ∘ funtranspos0 t1 t2 is2 ~
idfun (compl T t1)

  
T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
funtranspos0 t2 t1 is1 ∘ funtranspos0 t1 t2 is2 ~
idfun (compl T t1)
 
T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
x: compl T t1
(funtranspos0 t2 t1 is1 ∘ funtranspos0 t1 t2 is2) x =
idfun (compl T t1) x
 
T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
x: compl T t1
((λ x : compl T t2,
  match is1 (pr1 x) with
  | inl e =>
      match is1 t2 with
      | inl e' => fromempty (pr2 x (! e' @ e))
      | inr ne' => make_compl T t1 t2 ne'
      end
  | inr ne => make_compl T t1 (pr1 x) ne
  end)
 ∘ (λ x : compl T t1,
    match is2 (pr1 x) with
    | inl e =>
        match is2 t1 with
        | inl e' => fromempty (pr2 x (! e' @ e))
        | inr ne' => make_compl T t2 t1 ne'
        end
    | inr ne => make_compl T t2 (pr1 x) ne
    end)) x = idfun (compl T t1) x
 
T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
x: compl T t1
match
  is1
    (pr1
       match is2 (pr1 x) with
       | inl e =>
           match is2 t1 with
           | inl e' => fromempty (pr2 x (! e' @ e))
           | inr ne' => make_compl T t2 t1 ne'
           end
       | inr ne => make_compl T t2 (pr1 x) ne
       end)
with
| inl e =>
    match is1 t2 with
    | inl e' =>
        fromempty
          (pr2
             match is2 (pr1 x) with
             | inl e0 =>
                 match is2 t1 with
                 | inl e'0 =>
                     fromempty (pr2 x (! e'0 @ e0))
                 | inr ne' => make_compl T t2 t1 ne'
                 end
             | inr ne => make_compl T t2 (pr1 x) ne
             end (! e' @ e))
    | inr ne' => make_compl T t1 t2 ne'
    end
| inr ne =>
    make_compl T t1
      (pr1
         match is2 (pr1 x) with
         | inl e =>
             match is2 t1 with
             | inl e' => fromempty (pr2 x (! e' @ e))
             | inr ne' => make_compl T t2 t1 ne'
             end
         | inr ne0 => make_compl T t2 (pr1 x) ne0
         end) ne
end = x

       
T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
t: T
net1: t1 != t
match
  is1
    (pr1
       match is2 t with
       | inl e =>
           match is2 t1 with
           | inl e' => fromempty (net1 (! e' @ e))
           | inr ne' => make_compl T t2 t1 ne'
           end
       | inr ne => make_compl T t2 t ne
       end)
with
| inl e =>
    match is1 t2 with
    | inl e' =>
        fromempty
          (pr2
             match is2 t with
             | inl e0 =>
                 match is2 t1 with
                 | inl e'0 =>
                     fromempty (net1 (! e'0 @ e0))
                 | inr ne' => make_compl T t2 t1 ne'
                 end
             | inr ne => make_compl T t2 t ne
             end (! e' @ e))
    | inr ne' => make_compl T t1 t2 ne'
    end
| inr ne =>
    make_compl T t1
      (pr1
         match is2 t with
         | inl e =>
             match is2 t1 with
             | inl e' => fromempty (net1 (! e' @ e))
             | inr ne' => make_compl T t2 t1 ne'
             end
         | inr ne0 => make_compl T t2 t ne0
         end) ne
end = t,, net1

       
T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
t: T
net1: t1 != t
et2: t2 = t
match
  is1
    (pr1
       match is2 t1 with
       | inl e' => fromempty (net1 (! e' @ et2))
       | inr ne' => make_compl T t2 t1 ne'
       end)
with
| inl e =>
    match is1 t2 with
    | inl e' =>
        fromempty
          (pr2
             match is2 t1 with
             | inl e'0 =>
                 fromempty (net1 (! e'0 @ et2))
             | inr ne' => make_compl T t2 t1 ne'
             end (! e' @ e))
    | inr ne' => make_compl T t1 t2 ne'
    end
| inr ne =>
    make_compl T t1
      (pr1
         match is2 t1 with
         | inl e' => fromempty (net1 (! e' @ et2))
         | inr ne' => make_compl T t2 t1 ne'
         end) ne
end = t,, net1
T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
t: T
net1: t1 != t
net2: t2 != t
match is1 (pr1 (make_compl T t2 t net2)) with
| inl e =>
    match is1 t2 with
    | inl e' =>
        fromempty
          (pr2 (make_compl T t2 t net2) (! e' @ e))
    | inr ne' => make_compl T t1 t2 ne'
    end
| inr ne =>
    make_compl T t1 (pr1 (make_compl T t2 t net2)) ne
end = t,, net1

       
T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
t: T
net1: t1 != t
et2: t2 = t
match
  is1
    (pr1
       match is2 t1 with
       | inl e' => fromempty (net1 (! e' @ et2))
       | inr ne' => make_compl T t2 t1 ne'
       end)
with
| inl e =>
    match is1 t2 with
    | inl e' =>
        fromempty
          (pr2
             match is2 t1 with
             | inl e'0 =>
                 fromempty (net1 (! e'0 @ et2))
             | inr ne' => make_compl T t2 t1 ne'
             end (! e' @ e))
    | inr ne' => make_compl T t1 t2 ne'
    end
| inr ne =>
    make_compl T t1
      (pr1
         match is2 t1 with
         | inl e' => fromempty (net1 (! e' @ et2))
         | inr ne' => make_compl T t2 t1 ne'
         end) ne
end = t,, net1
 
T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
t: T
net1: t1 != t
et2: t2 = t
et2t1: t2 = t1
match
  is1 (pr1 (fromempty (net1 (! et2t1 @ et2))))
with
| inl e =>
    match is1 t2 with
    | inl e' =>
        fromempty
          (pr2 (fromempty (net1 (! et2t1 @ et2)))
             (! e' @ e))
    | inr ne' => make_compl T t1 t2 ne'
    end
| inr ne =>
    make_compl T t1
      (pr1 (fromempty (net1 (! et2t1 @ et2)))) ne
end = t,, net1
T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
t: T
net1: t1 != t
et2: t2 = t
net2t1: t2 != t1
match is1 (pr1 (make_compl T t2 t1 net2t1)) with
| inl e =>
    match is1 t2 with
    | inl e' =>
        fromempty
          (pr2 (make_compl T t2 t1 net2t1) (! e' @ e))
    | inr ne' => make_compl T t1 t2 ne'
    end
| inr ne =>
    make_compl T t1 (pr1 (make_compl T t2 t1 net2t1))
      ne
end = t,, net1

         
T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
t: T
net1: t1 != t
et2: t2 = t
et2t1: t2 = t1
match
  is1 (pr1 (fromempty (net1 (! et2t1 @ et2))))
with
| inl e =>
    match is1 t2 with
    | inl e' =>
        fromempty
          (pr2 (fromempty (net1 (! et2t1 @ et2)))
             (! e' @ e))
    | inr ne' => make_compl T t1 t2 ne'
    end
| inr ne =>
    make_compl T t1
      (pr1 (fromempty (net1 (! et2t1 @ et2)))) ne
end = t,, net1
 induction (net1 (pathscomp0 (pathsinv0 et2t1) et2)).
         
T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
t: T
net1: t1 != t
et2: t2 = t
net2t1: t2 != t1
match is1 (pr1 (make_compl T t2 t1 net2t1)) with
| inl e =>
    match is1 t2 with
    | inl e' =>
        fromempty
          (pr2 (make_compl T t2 t1 net2t1) (! e' @ e))
    | inr ne' => make_compl T t1 t2 ne'
    end
| inr ne =>
    make_compl T t1 (pr1 (make_compl T t2 t1 net2t1))
      ne
end = t,, net1
 
T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
t: T
net1: t1 != t
et2: t2 = t
net2t1: t2 != t1
match is1 t1 with
| inl e =>
    match is1 t2 with
    | inl e' => fromempty (net2t1 (! e' @ e))
    | inr ne' => make_compl T t1 t2 ne'
    end
| inr ne => make_compl T t1 t1 ne
end = t,, net1

is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
t: T
net1: t1 != t
et2: t2 = t
net2t1: t2 != t1
e: t1 = t1
match is1 t2 with
| inl e' => fromempty (net2t1 (! e' @ e))
| inr ne' => make_compl T t1 t2 ne'
end = t,, net1

is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
t: T
net1: t1 != t
et2: t2 = t
net2t1: t2 != t1
ne: t1 != t1
make_compl T t1 t1 ne = t,, net1

end = t,, net1

et2: t2 = t

e: t1 = t1
et1t2: t1 = t2
fromempty (net2t1 (! et1t2 @ e)) = t,, net1

is2: isisolated T t2

e: t1 = t1

induction (net2t1 (pathscomp0 (pathsinv0 et1t2) e)).

e: t1 = t1

t2 = t
 exact et2. }
           
T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
t: T
net1: t1 != t
et2: t2 = t
net2t1: t2 != t1
ne: t1 != t1
make_compl T t1 t1 ne = t,, net1
 induction (ne (idpath _)).
       
T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
t: T
net1: t1 != t
net2: t2 != t
match is1 (pr1 (make_compl T t2 t net2)) with
| inl e =>
    match is1 t2 with
    | inl e' =>
        fromempty
          (pr2 (make_compl T t2 t net2) (! e' @ e))
    | inr ne' => make_compl T t1 t2 ne'
    end
| inr ne =>
    make_compl T t1 (pr1 (make_compl T t2 t net2)) ne
end = t,, net1
 
T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
t: T
net1: t1 != t
net2: t2 != t
match is1 t with
| inl e =>
    match is1 t2 with
    | inl e' => fromempty (net2 (! e' @ e))
    | inr ne' => make_compl T t1 t2 ne'
    end
| inr ne => make_compl T t1 t ne
end = t,, net1
 
T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
t: T
net1: t1 != t
net2: t2 != t
et1t: t1 = t
match is1 t2 with
| inl e' => fromempty (net2 (! e' @ et1t))
| inr ne' => make_compl T t1 t2 ne'
end = t,, net1
T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
t: T
net1: t1 != t
net2: t2 != t
net1t: t1 != t
make_compl T t1 t net1t = t,, net1

         
T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
t: T
net1: t1 != t
net2: t2 != t
et1t: t1 = t
match is1 t2 with
| inl e' => fromempty (net2 (! e' @ et1t))
| inr ne' => make_compl T t1 t2 ne'
end = t,, net1
 induction (net1 et1t).
         
T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
t: T
net1: t1 != t
net2: t2 != t
net1t: t1 != t
make_compl T t1 t net1t = t,, net1
 
T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
t: T
net1: t1 != t
net2: t2 != t
net1t: t1 != t
pr1compl T t1 (make_compl T t1 t net1t) =
pr1compl T t1 (t,, net1)
 
T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
t: T
net1: t1 != t
net2: t2 != t
net1t: t1 != t
t = t

           apply idpath.
Defined.


T: UU
t1, t2: T
isisolated T t1
→ isisolated T t2 → compl T t1 ≃ compl T t2


T: UU
t1, t2: T
isisolated T t1
→ isisolated T t2 → compl T t1 ≃ compl T t2

  
T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
compl T t1 ≃ compl T t2

  
T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
∏ x : compl T t1,
funtranspos0 t2 t1 is1 (funtranspos0 t1 t2 is2 x) = x
T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
∏ y : compl T t2,
funtranspos0 t1 t2 is2 (funtranspos0 t2 t1 is1 y) = y

  
T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
∏ x : compl T t1,
funtranspos0 t2 t1 is1 (funtranspos0 t1 t2 is2 x) = x
 
T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
x: compl T t1
funtranspos0 t2 t1 is1 (funtranspos0 t1 t2 is2 x) = x
 apply (homottranspos0t2t1t1t2 t1 t2 is1 is2).
  
T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
∏ y : compl T t2,
funtranspos0 t1 t2 is2 (funtranspos0 t2 t1 is1 y) = y
 
T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
x: compl T t2
funtranspos0 t1 t2 is2 (funtranspos0 t2 t1 is1 x) = x
 apply (homottranspos0t2t1t1t2 t2 t1 is2 is1).
Defined.

(** *** Transposition of two isolated points *)


Definition funtranspos {T : UU} (t1 t2 : isolated T) : T -> T
  := recomplf (pr1 t1) (pr1 t2) (pr2 t1)
              (funtranspos0 (pr1 t1) (pr1 t2) (pr2 t2)).


T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
funtranspos (t2,, is2) (t1,, is1)
∘ funtranspos (t1,, is1) (t2,, is2) ~ idfun T


T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
funtranspos (t2,, is2) (t1,, is1)
∘ funtranspos (t1,, is1) (t2,, is2) ~ idfun T

  
T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
funtranspos (t2,, is2) (t1,, is1)
∘ funtranspos (t1,, is1) (t2,, is2) ~ idfun T
 
T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
t: T
(funtranspos (t2,, is2) (t1,, is1)
 ∘ funtranspos (t1,, is1) (t2,, is2)) t = idfun T t
 
T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
t: T
(recomplf (pr1 (t2,, is2)) (pr1 (t1,, is1))
   (pr2 (t2,, is2))
   (funtranspos0 (pr1 (t2,, is2)) (pr1 (t1,, is1))
      (pr2 (t1,, is1)))
 ∘ recomplf (pr1 (t1,, is1)) (pr1 (t2,, is2))
     (pr2 (t1,, is1))
     (funtranspos0 (pr1 (t1,, is1)) (pr1 (t2,, is2))
        (pr2 (t2,, is2)))) t = idfun T t

  
T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
t: T
recomplf t1 t1 is1
  (funtranspos0 (pr1 (t2,, is2)) (pr1 (t1,, is1))
     (pr2 (t1,, is1))
   ∘ funtranspos0 (pr1 (t1,, is1)) (pr1 (t2,, is2))
       (pr2 (t2,, is2))) t = idfun T t

  
T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
t: T
e:= homotrecomplfhomot t1 t1 is1
  (funtranspos0 t2 t1 is1 ∘ funtranspos0 t1 t2 is2)
  (idfun (compl T t1))
  (homottranspos0t2t1t1t2 t1 t2 is1 is2) t: recomplf t1 t1 is1
  (funtranspos0 t2 t1 is1 ∘ funtranspos0 t1 t2 is2)
  t = recomplf t1 t1 is1 (idfun (compl T t1)) t
recomplf t1 t1 is1
  (funtranspos0 (pr1 (t2,, is2)) (pr1 (t1,, is1))
     (pr2 (t1,, is1))
   ∘ funtranspos0 (pr1 (t1,, is1)) (pr1 (t2,, is2))
       (pr2 (t2,, is2))) t = idfun T t

  
T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
t: T
e:= homotrecomplfhomot t1 t1 is1
  (funtranspos0 t2 t1 is1 ∘ funtranspos0 t1 t2 is2)
  (idfun (compl T t1))
  (homottranspos0t2t1t1t2 t1 t2 is1 is2) t: recomplf t1 t1 is1
  (funtranspos0 t2 t1 is1 ∘ funtranspos0 t1 t2 is2)
  t = recomplf t1 t1 is1 (idfun (compl T t1)) t
e':= homotrecomplfidfun t1 is1 t: recomplf t1 t1 is1 (idfun (compl T t1)) t =
idfun T t
recomplf t1 t1 is1
  (funtranspos0 (pr1 (t2,, is2)) (pr1 (t1,, is1))
     (pr2 (t1,, is1))
   ∘ funtranspos0 (pr1 (t1,, is1)) (pr1 (t2,, is2))
       (pr2 (t2,, is2))) t = idfun T t

  apply (pathscomp0 e e').
Defined.



T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
T ≃ T


T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
T ≃ T

  
T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
T ≃ T

  
T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
f:= funtranspos (t1,, is1) (t2,, is2): T → T
T ≃ T

  
T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
f:= funtranspos (t1,, is1) (t2,, is2): T → T
g:= funtranspos (t2,, is2) (t1,, is1): T → T
T ≃ T

  
T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
f:= funtranspos (t1,, is1) (t2,, is2): T → T
g:= funtranspos (t2,, is2) (t1,, is1): T → T
isweq f

  
T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
f:= funtranspos (t1,, is1) (t2,, is2): T → T
g:= funtranspos (t2,, is2) (t1,, is1): T → T
egf: ∏ t : T, g (f t) = t
isweq f

  
T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
f:= funtranspos (t1,, is1) (t2,, is2): T → T
g:= funtranspos (t2,, is2) (t1,, is1): T → T
egf: ∏ t : T, g (f t) = t
efg: ∏ t : T, f (g t) = t
isweq f

  apply (isweq_iso _ _ egf efg).
Defined.



T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
funtranspos (t1,, is1) (t2,, is2) t1 = t2


T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
funtranspos (t1,, is1) (t2,, is2) t1 = t2

  
T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
funtranspos (t1,, is1) (t2,, is2) t1 = t2
 
T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
recomplf (pr1 (t1,, is1)) (pr1 (t2,, is2))
  (pr2 (t1,, is1))
  (funtranspos0 (pr1 (t1,, is1)) (pr1 (t2,, is2))
     (pr2 (t2,, is2))) t1 = t2
 
T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
t2 = t2

  apply idpath.
Defined.


T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
funtranspos (t1,, is1) (t2,, is2) t2 = t1


T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
funtranspos (t1,, is1) (t2,, is2) t2 = t1

  
T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
funtranspos (t1,, is1) (t2,, is2) t2 = t1
 
T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
recomplf (pr1 (t1,, is1)) (pr1 (t2,, is2))
  (pr2 (t1,, is1))
  (funtranspos0 (pr1 (t1,, is1)) (pr1 (t2,, is2))
     (pr2 (t2,, is2))) t2 = t1
 
T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
recomplf t1 t2 is1 (funtranspos0 t1 t2 is2) t2 = t1
 
T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
recomplf t1 t2 is1
  (λ x : compl T t1,
   match is2 (pr1 x) with
   | inl e =>
       match is2 t1 with
       | inl e' => fromempty (pr2 x (! e' @ e))
       | inr ne' => make_compl T t2 t1 ne'
       end
   | inr ne => make_compl T t2 (pr1 x) ne
   end) t2 = t1

  
T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
(recompl T t2
 ∘ (coprodf
      (λ x : compl T t1,
       match is2 (pr1 x) with
       | inl e =>
           match is2 t1 with
           | inl e' => fromempty (pr2 x (! e' @ e))
           | inr ne' => make_compl T t2 t1 ne'
           end
       | inr ne => make_compl T t2 (pr1 x) ne
       end) (idfun unit)
    ∘ invmap (weqrecompl T t1 is1))) t2 = t1
 
T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
(recompl T t2
 ∘ ((λ xy : compl T t1 ⨿ unit,
     match xy with
     | inl x =>
         inl
           match is2 (pr1 x) with
           | inl e =>
               match is2 t1 with
               | inl e' =>
                   fromempty (pr2 x (! e' @ e))
               | inr ne' => make_compl T t2 t1 ne'
               end
           | inr ne => make_compl T t2 (pr1 x) ne
           end
     | inr y => inr (idfun unit y)
     end) ∘ invmap (weqrecompl T t1 is1))) t2 = t1
 
T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
(recompl T t2
 ∘ ((λ xy : compl T t1 ⨿ unit,
     match xy with
     | inl x =>
         inl
           match is2 (pr1 x) with
           | inl e =>
               match is2 t1 with
               | inl e' =>
                   fromempty (pr2 x (! e' @ e))
               | inr ne' => make_compl T t2 t1 ne'
               end
           | inr ne => make_compl T t2 (pr1 x) ne
           end
     | inr y => inr (idfun unit y)
     end)
    ∘ (λ y : T,
       hfiberpr1 (weqrecompl T t1 is1) y
         (weqccontrhfiber (weqrecompl T t1 is1) y))))
  t2 = t1

  
T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
(recompl T t2
 ∘ ((λ xy : compl T t1 ⨿ unit,
     match xy with
     | inl x =>
         inl
           match is2 (pr1 x) with
           | inl e =>
               match is2 t1 with
               | inl e' =>
                   fromempty (pr2 x (! e' @ e))
               | inr ne' => make_compl T t2 t1 ne'
               end
           | inr ne => make_compl T t2 (pr1 x) ne
           end
     | inr y => inr (idfun unit y)
     end)
    ∘ (λ y : T,
       hfiberpr1
         (make_weq (recompl T t1)
            (isweqrecompl T t1 is1)) y
         (weqccontrhfiber
            (make_weq (recompl T t1)
               (isweqrecompl T t1 is1)) y)))) t2 = t1
 
T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
((λ u : compl T t2 ⨿ unit,
  match u with
  | inl x0 => pr1compl T t2 x0
  | inr _ => t2
  end)
 ∘ ((λ xy : compl T t1 ⨿ unit,
     match xy with
     | inl x =>
         inl
           match is2 (pr1 x) with
           | inl e =>
               match is2 t1 with
               | inl e' =>
                   fromempty (pr2 x (! e' @ e))
               | inr ne' => make_compl T t2 t1 ne'
               end
           | inr ne => make_compl T t2 (pr1 x) ne
           end
     | inr y => inr (idfun unit y)
     end)
    ∘ (λ y : T,
       hfiberpr1
         (make_weq
            (λ u : compl T t1 ⨿ unit,
             match u with
             | inl x0 => pr1compl T t1 x0
             | inr _ => t1
             end) (isweqrecompl T t1 is1)) y
         (weqccontrhfiber
            (make_weq
               (λ u : compl T t1 ⨿ unit,
                match u with
                | inl x0 => pr1compl T t1 x0
                | inr _ => t1
                end) (isweqrecompl T t1 is1)) y)))) t2 =
t1
 
T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
match
  match invrecompl T t1 is1 t2 with
  | inl x =>
      inl
        match is2 (pr1 x) with
        | inl e =>
            match is2 t1 with
            | inl e' => fromempty (pr2 x (! e' @ e))
            | inr ne' => make_compl T t2 t1 ne'
            end
        | inr ne => make_compl T t2 (pr1 x) ne
        end
  | inr y => inr y
  end
with
| inl x0 => pr1compl T t2 x0
| inr _ => t2
end = t1
 
T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
match
  match
    match is1 t2 with
    | inl _ => inr tt
    | inr phi => inl (make_compl T t1 t2 phi)
    end
  with
  | inl x =>
      inl
        match is2 (pr1 x) with
        | inl e =>
            match is2 t1 with
            | inl e' => fromempty (pr2 x (! e' @ e))
            | inr ne' => make_compl T t2 t1 ne'
            end
        | inr ne => make_compl T t2 (pr1 x) ne
        end
  | inr y => inr y
  end
with
| inl x0 => pr1compl T t2 x0
| inr _ => t2
end = t1

  
T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
et1t2: t1 = t2
t2 = t1
T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
net1t2: t1 != t2
pr1compl T t2
  match is2 (pr1 (make_compl T t1 t2 net1t2)) with
  | inl e =>
      match is2 t1 with
      | inl e' =>
          fromempty
            (pr2 (make_compl T t1 t2 net1t2)
               (! e' @ e))
      | inr ne' => make_compl T t2 t1 ne'
      end
  | inr ne =>
      make_compl T t2
        (pr1 (make_compl T t1 t2 net1t2)) ne
  end = t1

t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
et1t2: t1 = t2
t2 = t1
 apply (pathsinv0 et1t2).

is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
net1t2: t1 != t2
pr1compl T t2
  match is2 (pr1 (make_compl T t1 t2 net1t2)) with
  | inl e =>
      match is2 t1 with
      | inl e' =>
          fromempty
            (pr2 (make_compl T t1 t2 net1t2)
               (! e' @ e))
      | inr ne' => make_compl T t2 t1 ne'
      end
  | inr ne =>
      make_compl T t2
        (pr1 (make_compl T t1 t2 net1t2)) ne
  end = t1

  match is2 t2 with
  | inl e =>
      match is2 t1 with
      | inl e' => fromempty (net1t2 (! e' @ e))
      | inr ne' => make_compl T t2 t1 ne'
      end
  | inr ne => make_compl T t2 t2 ne
  end = t1

  match is2 t1 with
  | inl e' => fromempty (net1t2 (! e' @ et2t2))
  | inr ne' => make_compl T t2 t1 ne'
  end = t1

is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
net1t2: t1 != t2
net2t2: t2 != t2
pr1compl T t2 (make_compl T t2 t2 net2t2) = t1

  match is2 t1 with

t1
 induction (net1t2 (pathscomp0 (pathsinv0 et2t1) et2t2)).

is2: isisolated T t2

t1 = t1
 apply idpath.
    
T: UU

is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
net1t2: t1 != t2
net2t2: t2 != t2
pr1compl T t2 (make_compl T t2 t2 net2t2) = t1
 induction (net2t2 (idpath _)).
Defined.


T: UU

is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
t: T

net2t: t2 != t

T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
t: T
net1t: t1 != t
net2t: t2 != t
recomplf (pr1 (t1,, is1)) 
  (pr1 (t2,, is2)) (pr2 (t1,, is1))
  (funtranspos0 (pr1 (t1,, is1)) 
     (pr1 (t2,, is2)) (pr2 (t2,, is2))) t = t
 
T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
t: T
net1t: t1 != t
net2t: t2 != t
recomplf t1 t2 is1 (funtranspos0 t1 t2 is2) t = t
 
T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
t: T
net1t: t1 != t
net2t: t2 != t
recomplf t1 t2 is1
  (λ x : compl T t1,
   match is2 (pr1 x) with
   | inl e =>
       match is2 t1 with
       | inl e' => fromempty (pr2 x (! e' @ e))
       | inr ne' => make_compl T t2 t1 ne'
       end
   | inr ne => make_compl T t2 (pr1 x) ne
   end) t = t
 
T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
t: T
net1t: t1 != t
net2t: t2 != t
(recompl T t2
 ∘ (coprodf
      (λ x : compl T t1,
       match is2 (pr1 x) with
       | inl e =>
           match is2 t1 with
           | inl e' => fromempty (pr2 x (! e' @ e))
           | inr ne' => make_compl T t2 t1 ne'
           end
       | inr ne => make_compl T t2 (pr1 x) ne
       end) (idfun unit)
    ∘ invmap (weqrecompl T t1 is1))) t = t

  
T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
t: T
net1t: t1 != t
net2t: t2 != t
(recompl T t2
 ∘ ((λ xy : compl T t1 ⨿ unit,
     match xy with
     | inl x =>
         inl
           match is2 (pr1 x) with
           | inl e =>
               match is2 t1 with
               | inl e' =>
                   fromempty (pr2 x (! e' @ e))
               | inr ne' => make_compl T t2 t1 ne'
               end
           | inr ne => make_compl T t2 (pr1 x) ne
           end
     | inr y => inr (idfun unit y)
     end) ∘ invmap (weqrecompl T t1 is1))) t = t
 
T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
t: T
net1t: t1 != t
net2t: t2 != t
(recompl T t2
 ∘ ((λ xy : compl T t1 ⨿ unit,
     match xy with
     | inl x =>
         inl
           match is2 (pr1 x) with
           | inl e =>
               match is2 t1 with
               | inl e' =>
                   fromempty (pr2 x (! e' @ e))
               | inr ne' => make_compl T t2 t1 ne'
               end
           | inr ne => make_compl T t2 (pr1 x) ne
           end
     | inr y => inr (idfun unit y)
     end)
    ∘ (λ y : T,
       hfiberpr1 (weqrecompl T t1 is1) y
         (weqccontrhfiber (weqrecompl T t1 is1) y))))
  t = t
 
T: UU
t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
t: T
net1t: t1 != t
net2t: t2 != t
(recompl T t2
 ∘ ((λ xy : compl T t1 ⨿ unit,
     match xy with
     | inl x =>
         inl
           match is2 (pr1 x) with
           | inl e =>
               match is2 t1 with
               | inl e' =>

               end
           | inr ne => make_compl T t2 (pr1 x) ne
           end
     | inr y => inr (idfun unit y)
     end)
    ∘ (λ y : T,
       hfiberpr1
         (make_weq (recompl T t1)
            (isweqrecompl T t1 is1)) y
         (weqccontrhfiber
            (make_weq (recompl T t1)
               (isweqrecompl T t1 is1)) y)))) t = t

t1, t2: T
is1: isisolated T t1
is2: isisolated T t2
t: T

net2t: t2 != t
((λ u : compl T t2 ⨿ unit,
  match u with
  | inl x0 => pr1compl T t2 x0
  | inr _ => t2
  end)
 ∘ ((λ xy : compl T t1 ⨿ unit,
     match xy with
     | inl x =>
         inl
           match is2 (pr1 x) with
           | inl e =>
               match is2 t1 with
               | inl e' =>
                   fromempty (pr2 x (! e' @ e))
               | inr ne' => make_compl T t2 t1 ne'
               end
           | inr ne => make_compl T t2 (pr1 x) ne
           end
     | inr y => inr (idfun unit y)
     end)
    ∘ (λ y : T,
       hfiberpr1
         (make_weq
            (λ u : compl T t1 ⨿ unit,
             match u with
             | inl x0 => pr1compl T t1 x0
             | inr _ => t1
             end) (isweqrecompl T t1 is1)) y

            (make_weq
               (λ u : compl T t1 ⨿ unit,
                match u with
                | inl x0 => pr1compl T t1 x0
                | inr _ => t1
                end) (isweqrecompl T t1 is1)) y)))) t =
t

      end
  | inr ne =>
