(** ** Semi-boolean hfiber of functions over isolated points *)



X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
X → bool


X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
X → bool

  
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
x': X
bool
 
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
x': X
a: x = x'
bool
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
x': X
b: x != x'
bool
 
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
x': X
b: x != x'
bool
 apply false.
Defined.


X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
iscontr (hfiber (eqbx X x is) true)


X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
iscontr (hfiber (eqbx X x is) true)

  
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
iscontr (hfiber (eqbx X x is) true)

  
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
eqbx X x is x = true
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
b: eqbx X x is x = true
iscontr (hfiber (eqbx X x is) true)

  
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
eqbx X x is x = true

    
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
coprod_rect (λ _ : (x = x) ⨿ (x != x), bool)
  (λ _ : x = x, true) (λ _ : x != x, false) (is x) =
true
 
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
e: x = x
coprod_rect (λ _ : (x = x) ⨿ (x != x), bool)
  (λ _ : x = x, true) (λ _ : x != x, false) (inl e) =
true
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
ne: x != x
coprod_rect (λ _ : (x = x) ⨿ (x != x), bool)
  (λ _ : x = x, true) (λ _ : x != x, false) (inr ne) =
true

    
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
e: x = x
coprod_rect (λ _ : (x = x) ⨿ (x != x), bool)
  (λ _ : x = x, true) (λ _ : x != x, false) (inl e) =
true
 apply idpath.
    
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
ne: x != x
coprod_rect (λ _ : (x = x) ⨿ (x != x), bool)
  (λ _ : x = x, true) (λ _ : x != x, false) (inr ne) =
true
 induction (ne (idpath _)).
  
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
b: eqbx X x is x = true
iscontr (hfiber (eqbx X x is) true)

  
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
b: eqbx X x is x = true
i:= make_hfiber (eqbx X x is) x b: hfiber (eqbx X x is) true
iscontr (hfiber (eqbx X x is) true)
 
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
b: eqbx X x is x = true
i:= make_hfiber (eqbx X x is) x b: hfiber (eqbx X x is) true
∏ t : hfiber (eqbx X x is) true, t = i

  
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
b: eqbx X x is x = true
i:= make_hfiber (eqbx X x is) x b: hfiber (eqbx X x is) true
∏
t : hfiber
      (λ x' : X,
       coprod_rect (λ _ : (x = x') ⨿ (x != x'), bool)
         (λ _ : x = x', true) (λ _ : x != x', false)
         (is x')) true, t = i
 
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
b: eqbx X x is x = true
i:= make_hfiber (eqbx X x is) x b: hfiber (eqbx X x is) true
b': eqbx X x is x = true
∏
t : hfiber
      (λ x' : X,
       coprod_rect (λ _ : (x = x') ⨿ (x != x'), bool)
         (λ _ : x = x', true) (λ _ : x != x', false)
         (is x')) true, t = i
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
b: eqbx X x is x = true
i:= make_hfiber (eqbx X x is) x b: hfiber (eqbx X x is) true
nb': eqbx X x is x = false
∏
t : hfiber
      (λ x' : X,
       coprod_rect (λ _ : (x = x') ⨿ (x != x'), bool)
         (λ _ : x = x', true) (λ _ : x != x', false)
         (is x')) true, t = i

  
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
b: eqbx X x is x = true
i:= make_hfiber (eqbx X x is) x b: hfiber (eqbx X x is) true
b': eqbx X x is x = true
∏
t : hfiber
      (λ x' : X,
       coprod_rect (λ _ : (x = x') ⨿ (x != x'), bool)
         (λ _ : x = x', true) (λ _ : x != x', false)
         (is x')) true, t = i
 
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
b: eqbx X x is x = true
i:= make_hfiber (eqbx X x is) x b: hfiber (eqbx X x is) true
b': eqbx X x is x = true
t: hfiber
  (λ x' : X,
   coprod_rect (λ _ : (x = x') ⨿ (x != x'), bool)
     (λ _ : x = x', true) (λ _ : x != x', false)
     (is x')) true
t = i
 
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
b: eqbx X x is x = true
i:= make_hfiber (eqbx X x is) x b: hfiber (eqbx X x is) true
b': eqbx X x is x = true
x': X
e: coprod_rect (λ _ : (x = x') ⨿ (x != x'), bool)
  (λ _ : x = x', true) (λ _ : x != x', false)
  (is x') = true
x',, e = i

    
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
b: eqbx X x is x = true
i:= make_hfiber (eqbx X x is) x b: hfiber (eqbx X x is) true
b': eqbx X x is x = true
x': X
e: coprod_rect (λ _ : (x = x') ⨿ (x != x'), bool)
  (λ _ : x = x', true) (λ _ : x != x', false)
  (is x') = true
x' = x
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
b: eqbx X x is x = true
i:= make_hfiber (eqbx X x is) x b: hfiber (eqbx X x is) true
b': eqbx X x is x = true
x': X
e: coprod_rect (λ _ : (x = x') ⨿ (x != x'), bool)
  (λ _ : x = x', true) (λ _ : x != x', false)
  (is x') = true
e': x' = x
x',, e = i

    
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
b: eqbx X x is x = true
i:= make_hfiber (eqbx X x is) x b: hfiber (eqbx X x is) true
b': eqbx X x is x = true
x': X
e: coprod_rect (λ _ : (x = x') ⨿ (x != x'), bool)
  (λ _ : x = x', true) (λ _ : x != x', false)
  (is x') = true
x' = x

      
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
b: eqbx X x is x = true
i:= make_hfiber (eqbx X x is) x b: hfiber (eqbx X x is) true
b': eqbx X x is x = true
x': X
ee: x = x'
e: coprod_rect (λ _ : (x = x') ⨿ (x != x'), bool)
  (λ _ : x = x', true) (λ _ : x != x', false)
  (inl ee) = true
x' = x
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
b: eqbx X x is x = true
i:= make_hfiber (eqbx X x is) x b: hfiber (eqbx X x is) true
b': eqbx X x is x = true
x': X
nee: x != x'
e: coprod_rect (λ _ : (x = x') ⨿ (x != x'), bool)
  (λ _ : x = x', true) (λ _ : x != x', false)
  (inr nee) = true
x' = x
 
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
b: eqbx X x is x = true
i:= make_hfiber (eqbx X x is) x b: hfiber (eqbx X x is) true
b': eqbx X x is x = true
x': X
nee: x != x'
e: coprod_rect (λ _ : (x = x') ⨿ (x != x'), bool)
  (λ _ : x = x', true) (λ _ : x != x', false)
  (inr nee) = true
x' = x

      induction (nopathsfalsetotrue e) .
    
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
b: eqbx X x is x = true
i:= make_hfiber (eqbx X x is) x b: hfiber (eqbx X x is) true
b': eqbx X x is x = true
x': X
e: coprod_rect (λ _ : (x = x') ⨿ (x != x'), bool)
  (λ _ : x = x', true) (λ _ : x != x', false)
  (is x') = true
e': x' = x
x',, e = i

    apply (invmaponpathsincl _ (isinclfromhfiber (eqbx X x is) isasetbool true)
                             (make_hfiber _ x' e) i e').
  
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
b: eqbx X x is x = true
i:= make_hfiber (eqbx X x is) x b: hfiber (eqbx X x is) true
nb': eqbx X x is x = false
∏
t : hfiber
      (λ x' : X,
       coprod_rect (λ _ : (x = x') ⨿ (x != x'), bool)
         (λ _ : x = x', true) (λ _ : x != x', false)
         (is x')) true, t = i
 induction (nopathstruetofalse (pathscomp0 (pathsinv0 b) nb')).
Defined.

Definition bhfiber {X Y : UU} (f : X -> Y) (y : Y) (is : isisolated Y y)
  := hfiber (λ x : X, eqbx Y y is (f x)) true.


X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
y: Y
is: isisolated Y y
hfiber f y ≃ bhfiber f y is


X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
y: Y
is: isisolated Y y
hfiber f y ≃ bhfiber f y is

  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
y: Y
is: isisolated Y y
hfiber f y ≃ bhfiber f y is
 
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
y: Y
is: isisolated Y y
g:= eqbx Y y is: Y → bool
hfiber f y ≃ bhfiber f y is
 
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
y: Y
is: isisolated Y y
g:= eqbx Y y is: Y → bool
ye:= pr1 (iscontrhfibereqbx Y y is): hfiber (eqbx Y y is) true
hfiber f y ≃ bhfiber f y is

  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
y: Y
is: isisolated Y y
g:= eqbx Y y is: Y → bool
ye:= pr1 (iscontrhfibereqbx Y y is): hfiber (eqbx Y y is) true
isweq (hfibersftogf f g true ye)

  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
y: Y
is: isisolated Y y
g:= eqbx Y y is: Y → bool
ye:= pr1 (iscontrhfibereqbx Y y is): hfiber (eqbx Y y is) true
isofhlevel 1 (hfiber (eqbx Y y is) true)

  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
y: Y
is: isisolated Y y
g:= eqbx Y y is: Y → bool
ye:= pr1 (iscontrhfibereqbx Y y is): hfiber (eqbx Y y is) true
iscontr (hfiber (eqbx Y y is) true)

  apply (iscontrhfibereqbx _ y is).
Defined.















(** *** h-fibers of [ ii1 ] and [ ii2 ] *)



X, Y: UU
isincl inl


X, Y: UU
isincl inl

  
X, Y: UU
isincl inl

  
X, Y: UU
f:= inl: X → X ⨿ Y
isincl f
 
X, Y: UU
f:= inl: X → X ⨿ Y
g:= coprodtoboolsum X Y: X ⨿ Y → ∑ y, boolsumfun X Y y
isincl f

  
X, Y: UU
f:= inl: X → X ⨿ Y
g:= coprodtoboolsum X Y: X ⨿ Y → ∑ y, boolsumfun X Y y
gf:= λ x : X, g (f x): X → ∑ y, boolsumfun X Y y
isincl f

  
X, Y: UU
f:= inl: X → X ⨿ Y
g:= coprodtoboolsum X Y: X ⨿ Y → ∑ y, boolsumfun X Y y
gf:= λ x : X, g (f x): X → ∑ y, boolsumfun X Y y
gf':= λ x : X, true,, x: X → ∑ y, boolsumfun X Y y
isincl f

  
X, Y: UU
f:= inl: X → X ⨿ Y
g:= coprodtoboolsum X Y: X ⨿ Y → ∑ y, boolsumfun X Y y
gf:= λ x : X, g (f x): X → ∑ y, boolsumfun X Y y
gf':= λ x : X, true,, x: X → ∑ y, boolsumfun X Y y
h: ∏ x : X, gf' x = gf x
isincl f

  
X, Y: UU
f:= inl: X → X ⨿ Y
g:= coprodtoboolsum X Y: X ⨿ Y → ∑ y, boolsumfun X Y y
gf:= λ x : X, g (f x): X → ∑ y, boolsumfun X Y y
gf':= λ x : X, true,, x: X → ∑ y, boolsumfun X Y y
h: ∏ x : X, gf' x = gf x
is1: isofhlevelf 1 gf'
isincl f

  
X, Y: UU
f:= inl: X → X ⨿ Y
g:= coprodtoboolsum X Y: X ⨿ Y → ∑ y, boolsumfun X Y y
gf:= λ x : X, g (f x): X → ∑ y, boolsumfun X Y y
gf':= λ x : X, true,, x: X → ∑ y, boolsumfun X Y y
h: ∏ x : X, gf' x = gf x
is1: isofhlevelf 1 gf'
is2: isofhlevelf 1 gf
isincl f

  apply (isofhlevelff (S O) _ _ is2 (isofhlevelfweq (S (S O))
                                                    (weqcoprodtoboolsum X Y))).
Defined.



X, Y: UU
x: X
iscontr (hfiber inl (inl x))


X, Y: UU
x: X
iscontr (hfiber inl (inl x))

  
X, Y: UU
x: X
iscontr (hfiber inl (inl x))

  
X, Y: UU
x: X
xe1:= make_hfiber inl x (idpath (inl x)): hfiber inl (inl x)
iscontr (hfiber inl (inl x))

  apply (iscontraprop1 (isinclii1 X Y (ii1 x)) xe1).
Defined.


X, Y: UU
y: Y
¬ hfiber inl (inr y)


X, Y: UU
y: Y
¬ hfiber inl (inr y)

  
X, Y: UU
y: Y
¬ hfiber inl (inr y)
 
X, Y: UU
y: Y
xe: hfiber inl (inr y)
∅
 
X, Y: UU
y: Y
x: X
e: inl x = inr y
∅
 apply (negpathsii1ii2 _ _ e).
Defined.






X, Y: UU
isincl inr


X, Y: UU
isincl inr

  
X, Y: UU
isincl inr

  
X, Y: UU
f:= inr: Y → X ⨿ Y
isincl f
 
X, Y: UU
f:= inr: Y → X ⨿ Y
g:= coprodtoboolsum X Y: X ⨿ Y → ∑ y, boolsumfun X Y y
isincl f

  
X, Y: UU
f:= inr: Y → X ⨿ Y
g:= coprodtoboolsum X Y: X ⨿ Y → ∑ y, boolsumfun X Y y
gf:= λ y : Y, g (f y): Y → ∑ y, boolsumfun X Y y
isincl f

  
X, Y: UU
f:= inr: Y → X ⨿ Y
g:= coprodtoboolsum X Y: X ⨿ Y → ∑ y, boolsumfun X Y y
gf:= λ y : Y, g (f y): Y → ∑ y, boolsumfun X Y y
gf':= λ y : Y, false,, y: Y → ∑ y, boolsumfun X Y y
isincl f

  
X, Y: UU
f:= inr: Y → X ⨿ Y
g:= coprodtoboolsum X Y: X ⨿ Y → ∑ y, boolsumfun X Y y
gf:= λ y : Y, g (f y): Y → ∑ y, boolsumfun X Y y
gf':= λ y : Y, false,, y: Y → ∑ y, boolsumfun X Y y
h: ∏ y : Y, gf' y = gf y
isincl f

  
X, Y: UU
f:= inr: Y → X ⨿ Y
g:= coprodtoboolsum X Y: X ⨿ Y → ∑ y, boolsumfun X Y y
gf:= λ y : Y, g (f y): Y → ∑ y, boolsumfun X Y y
gf':= λ y : Y, false,, y: Y → ∑ y, boolsumfun X Y y
h: ∏ y : Y, gf' y = gf y
is1: isofhlevelf 1 gf'
isincl f

  
X, Y: UU
f:= inr: Y → X ⨿ Y
g:= coprodtoboolsum X Y: X ⨿ Y → ∑ y, boolsumfun X Y y
gf:= λ y : Y, g (f y): Y → ∑ y, boolsumfun X Y y
gf':= λ y : Y, false,, y: Y → ∑ y, boolsumfun X Y y
h: ∏ y : Y, gf' y = gf y
is1: isofhlevelf 1 gf'
is2: isofhlevelf 1 gf
isincl f

  apply (isofhlevelff (S O)  _ _ is2
                      (isofhlevelfweq (S (S O)) (weqcoprodtoboolsum X Y))).
Defined.



X, Y: UU
y: Y
iscontr (hfiber inr (inr y))


X, Y: UU
y: Y
iscontr (hfiber inr (inr y))

  
X, Y: UU
y: Y
iscontr (hfiber inr (inr y))
 
X, Y: UU
y: Y
xe1:= make_hfiber inr y (idpath (inr y)): hfiber inr (inr y)
iscontr (hfiber inr (inr y))

  apply (iscontraprop1 (isinclii2 X Y (ii2 y)) xe1).
Defined.


X, Y: UU
x: X
¬ hfiber inr (inl x)


X, Y: UU
x: X
¬ hfiber inr (inl x)

  
X, Y: UU
x: X
¬ hfiber inr (inl x)
 
X, Y: UU
x: X
ye: hfiber inr (inl x)
∅
 
X, Y: UU
x: X
y: Y
e: inr y = inl x
∅
 apply (negpathsii2ii1 _ _ e).
Defined.





X, Y: UU
z: X ⨿ Y
hfiber inl z → hfiber inr z → ∅


X, Y: UU
z: X ⨿ Y
hfiber inl z → hfiber inr z → ∅

  
X, Y: UU
z: X ⨿ Y
X0: hfiber inl z
X1: hfiber inr z
∅
 
X, Y: UU
z: X ⨿ Y
t: X
x: inl t = z
X1: hfiber inr z
∅
 
X, Y: UU
z: X ⨿ Y
t: X
x: inl t = z
t0: Y
x0: inr t0 = z
∅

  
X, Y: UU
z: X ⨿ Y
t: X
x: inl t = z
t0: Y
x0: inr t0 = z
e:= x @ ! x0: inl t = inr t0
∅

  apply (negpathsii1ii2 _ _  e).
Defined.


(** *** [ ii1 ] and [ ii2 ] map isolated points to isolated points *)


X, Y: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
isisolated (X ⨿ Y) (inl x)


X, Y: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
isisolated (X ⨿ Y) (inl x)

  
X, Y: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
isisolated (X ⨿ Y) (inl x)
 
X, Y: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
∏ x' : X ⨿ Y, (inl x = x') ⨿ (inl x != x')
 
X, Y: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
x': X ⨿ Y
(inl x = x') ⨿ (inl x != x')
 
X, Y: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
x0: X
(inl x = inl x0) ⨿ (inl x != inl x0)
X, Y: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
y: Y
(inl x = inr y) ⨿ (inl x != inr y)

  
X, Y: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
x0: X
(inl x = inl x0) ⨿ (inl x != inl x0)
 
X, Y: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
x0: X
p: x = x0
(inl x = inl x0) ⨿ (inl x != inl x0)
X, Y: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
x0: X
e: x != x0
(inl x = inl x0) ⨿ (inl x != inl x0)

    
X, Y: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
x0: X
p: x = x0
(inl x = inl x0) ⨿ (inl x != inl x0)
 apply (ii1 (maponpaths (@ii1 X Y) p)).
    
X, Y: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
x0: X
e: x != x0
(inl x = inl x0) ⨿ (inl x != inl x0)
 apply (ii2 (negf (invmaponpathsincl (@ii1 X Y) (isinclii1 X Y) _ _) e)).
  
X, Y: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
y: Y
(inl x = inr y) ⨿ (inl x != inr y)
 apply (ii2 (negpathsii1ii2 x y)).
Defined.



X, Y: UU
y: Y
is: isisolated Y y
isisolated (X ⨿ Y) (inr y)


X, Y: UU
y: Y
is: isisolated Y y
isisolated (X ⨿ Y) (inr y)

  
X, Y: UU
y: Y
is: isisolated Y y
isisolated (X ⨿ Y) (inr y)
 
X, Y: UU
y: Y
is: isisolated Y y
x': X ⨿ Y
(inr y = x') ⨿ (inr y != x')
 
X, Y: UU
y: Y
is: isisolated Y y
x: X
(inr y = inl x) ⨿ (inr y != inl x)
X, Y: UU
y: Y
is: isisolated Y y
y0: Y
(inr y = inr y0) ⨿ (inr y != inr y0)

  
X, Y: UU
y: Y
is: isisolated Y y
x: X
(inr y = inl x) ⨿ (inr y != inl x)
 apply (ii2 (negpathsii2ii1 x y)).
  
X, Y: UU
y: Y
is: isisolated Y y
y0: Y
(inr y = inr y0) ⨿ (inr y != inr y0)
 
X, Y: UU
y: Y
is: isisolated Y y
y0: Y
p: y = y0
(inr y = inr y0) ⨿ (inr y != inr y0)
X, Y: UU
y: Y
is: isisolated Y y
y0: Y
e: y != y0
(inr y = inr y0) ⨿ (inr y != inr y0)

    
X, Y: UU
y: Y
is: isisolated Y y
y0: Y
p: y = y0
(inr y = inr y0) ⨿ (inr y != inr y0)
 apply (ii1 (maponpaths (@ii2 X Y) p)).
    
X, Y: UU
y: Y
is: isisolated Y y
y0: Y
e: y != y0
(inr y = inr y0) ⨿ (inr y != inr y0)
 apply (ii2 (negf (invmaponpathsincl (@ii2 X Y) (isinclii2 X Y) _ _) e)).
Defined.























(** *** h-fibers of [ coprodf ] of two functions *)



X, Y, X', Y': UU
f: X → X'
g: Y → Y'
x': X'
hfiber f x' ≃ hfiber (coprodf f g) (inl x')


X, Y, X', Y': UU
f: X → X'
g: Y → Y'
x': X'
hfiber f x' ≃ hfiber (coprodf f g) (inl x')

  
X, Y, X', Y': UU
f: X → X'
g: Y → Y'
x': X'
hfiber f x' ≃ hfiber (coprodf f g) (inl x')

f: X → X'
g: Y → Y'

xy: X ⨿ Y
e: fpg xy = ix' x'
u:= invezmaphf ix fpg (ix' x') (xy,, e): hfiber (hfibersgftog ix fpg (ix' x')) (xy,, e)
→ hfiber ix (pr1 (xy,, e))

g: Y → Y'
y': Y'
iy:= inr: Y → X ⨿ Y
iy':= inr: Y' → X' ⨿ Y'
fpg:= coprodf f g: X ⨿ Y → X' ⨿ Y'
fpgiy:= λ y : Y, fpg (iy y): Y → X' ⨿ Y'
w1: hfiber g y' ≃ hfiber fpgiy (iy' y')
y0: Y
e: fpg (inr y0) = iy' y'
u:= invezmaphf iy fpg (iy' y') (inr y0,, e): hfiber (hfibersgftog iy fpg (iy' y')) (inr y0,, e)
→ hfiber iy (pr1 (inr y0,, e))
is: isweq u
iscontr (hfiber iy (pr1 (inr y0,, e)))
 
X, Y, X', Y': UU
f: X → X'
g: Y → Y'
y': Y'
iy:= inr: Y → X ⨿ Y
iy':= inr: Y' → X' ⨿ Y'
fpg:= coprodf f g: X ⨿ Y → X' ⨿ Y'
fpgiy:= λ y : Y, fpg (iy y): Y → X' ⨿ Y'
w1: hfiber g y' ≃ hfiber fpgiy (iy' y')
y0: Y
e: fpg (inr y0) = iy' y'
u:= invezmaphf iy fpg (iy' y') (inr y0,, e): hfiber (hfibersgftog iy fpg (iy' y')) (inr y0,, e)
→ hfiber iy (pr1 (inr y0,, e))
is: isweq u
iscontr (hfiber iy (inr y0))

    
X, Y, X', Y': UU
f: X → X'
g: Y → Y'
y': Y'
iy:= inr: Y → X ⨿ Y
iy':= inr: Y' → X' ⨿ Y'
fpg:= coprodf f g: X ⨿ Y → X' ⨿ Y'
fpgiy:= λ y : Y, fpg (iy y): Y → X' ⨿ Y'
w1: hfiber g y' ≃ hfiber fpgiy (iy' y')
y0: Y
e: fpg (inr y0) = iy' y'
u:= invezmaphf iy fpg (iy' y') (inr y0,, e): hfiber (hfibersgftog iy fpg (iy' y')) (inr y0,, e)
→ hfiber iy (pr1 (inr y0,, e))
is: isweq u
isincl inr
 apply (isinclii2 X Y).
  
X, Y, X', Y': UU
f: X → X'
g: Y → Y'
y': Y'
iy:= inr: Y → X ⨿ Y
iy':= inr: Y' → X' ⨿ Y'
fpg:= coprodf f g: X ⨿ Y → X' ⨿ Y'
fpgiy:= λ y : Y, fpg (iy y): Y → X' ⨿ Y'
w1: hfiber g y' ≃ hfiber fpgiy (iy' y')
w2: hfiber fpgiy (iy' y') ≃ hfiber fpg (iy' y')
hfiber g y' ≃ hfiber fpg (iy' y')

  apply (weqcomp w1 w2).
Defined.





(** *** Theorem saying that coproduct of two functions of h-level n is of h-level n *)




n: nat
X, Y, Z, T: UU
f: X → Z
g: Y → T
is1: isofhlevelf n f
is2: isofhlevelf n g
isofhlevelf n (coprodf f g)


n: nat
X, Y, Z, T: UU
f: X → Z
g: Y → T
is1: isofhlevelf n f
is2: isofhlevelf n g
isofhlevelf n (coprodf f g)

  
n: nat
X, Y, Z, T: UU
f: X → Z
g: Y → T
is1: isofhlevelf n f
is2: isofhlevelf n g
isofhlevelf n (coprodf f g)
 
n: nat
X, Y, Z, T: UU
f: X → Z
g: Y → T
is1: isofhlevelf n f
is2: isofhlevelf n g
∏ y : Z ⨿ T, isofhlevel n (hfiber (coprodf f g) y)
 
n: nat
X, Y, Z, T: UU
f: X → Z
g: Y → T
is1: isofhlevelf n f
is2: isofhlevelf n g
y: Z ⨿ T
isofhlevel n (hfiber (coprodf f g) y)
 
n: nat
X, Y, Z, T: UU
f: X → Z
g: Y → T
is1: isofhlevelf n f
is2: isofhlevelf n g
z: Z
isofhlevel n (hfiber (coprodf f g) (inl z))
n: nat
X, Y, Z, T: UU
f: X → Z
g: Y → T
is1: isofhlevelf n f
is2: isofhlevelf n g
t: T
isofhlevel n (hfiber (coprodf f g) (inr t))

  
n: nat
X, Y, Z, T: UU
f: X → Z
g: Y → T
is1: isofhlevelf n f
is2: isofhlevelf n g
z: Z
isofhlevel n (hfiber f z)
n: nat
X, Y, Z, T: UU
f: X → Z
g: Y → T
is1: isofhlevelf n f
is2: isofhlevelf n g
t: T
isofhlevel n (hfiber (coprodf f g) (inr t))
 
n: nat
X, Y, Z, T: UU
f: X → Z
g: Y → T
is1: isofhlevelf n f
is2: isofhlevelf n g
t: T
isofhlevel n (hfiber (coprodf f g) (inr t))

  
n: nat
X, Y, Z, T: UU
f: X → Z
g: Y → T
is1: isofhlevelf n f
is2: isofhlevelf n g
t: T
isofhlevel n (hfiber g t)
 apply (is2 t).
Defined.





(** *** Theorems about h-levels of coproducts and their component types *)



n: nat
X, Y: UU
isofhlevel (S n) (X ⨿ Y) → isofhlevel (S n) X


n: nat
X, Y: UU
isofhlevel (S n) (X ⨿ Y) → isofhlevel (S n) X

  
n: nat
X, Y: UU
is: isofhlevel (S n) (X ⨿ Y)
isofhlevel (S n) X

  apply (isofhlevelXfromfY (S n) (@ii1 X Y)
                           (isofhlevelfsnincl n _ (isinclii1 _ _)) is).
Defined.



n: nat
X, Y: UU
isofhlevel (S n) (X ⨿ Y) → isofhlevel (S n) Y


n: nat
X, Y: UU
isofhlevel (S n) (X ⨿ Y) → isofhlevel (S n) Y

  
n: nat
X, Y: UU
is: isofhlevel (S n) (X ⨿ Y)
isofhlevel (S n) Y

  apply (isofhlevelXfromfY (S n) (@ii2 X Y)
                           (isofhlevelfsnincl n _ (isinclii2 _ _)) is).
Defined.



n: nat
X, Y: UU
isx: isofhlevel (S (S n)) X
isy: isofhlevel (S (S n)) Y
isofhlevel (S (S n)) (X ⨿ Y)


n: nat
X, Y: UU
isx: isofhlevel (S (S n)) X
isy: isofhlevel (S (S n)) Y
isofhlevel (S (S n)) (X ⨿ Y)

  
n: nat
X, Y: UU
isx: isofhlevel (S (S n)) X
isy: isofhlevel (S (S n)) Y
isofhlevel (S (S n)) (X ⨿ Y)
 
n: nat
X, Y: UU
isx: isofhlevel (S (S n)) X
isy: isofhlevel (S (S n)) Y
isofhlevelf (S (S n)) (λ _ : X ⨿ Y, tt)

  
n: nat
X, Y: UU
isx: isofhlevel (S (S n)) X
isy: isofhlevel (S (S n)) Y
f:= coprodf (λ _ : X, tt) (λ _ : Y, tt): X ⨿ Y → unit ⨿ unit
isofhlevelf (S (S n)) (λ _ : X ⨿ Y, tt)

  
n: nat
X, Y: UU
isx: isofhlevel (S (S n)) X
isy: isofhlevel (S (S n)) Y
f:= coprodf (λ _ : X, tt) (λ _ : Y, tt): X ⨿ Y → unit ⨿ unit
is1: isofhlevelf (S (S n)) f
isofhlevelf (S (S n)) (λ _ : X ⨿ Y, tt)

  
n: nat
X, Y: UU
isx: isofhlevel (S (S n)) X
isy: isofhlevel (S (S n)) Y
f:= coprodf (λ _ : X, tt) (λ _ : Y, tt): X ⨿ Y → unit ⨿ unit
is1: isofhlevelf (S (S n)) f
is2: isofhlevel (S (S n)) (unit ⨿ unit)
isofhlevelf (S (S n)) (λ _ : X ⨿ Y, tt)

  apply (isofhlevelfgf (S (S n)) _ _ is1 (isofhleveltofun _ _ is2)).
Defined.



X, Y: UU
isx: isaset X
isy: isaset Y
isaset (X ⨿ Y)


X, Y: UU
isx: isaset X
isy: isaset Y
isaset (X ⨿ Y)

  
X, Y: UU
isx: isaset X
isy: isaset Y
isaset (X ⨿ Y)
 apply (isofhlevelssncoprod 0 _ _ isx isy).
Defined.

X, Y, Z: UU

g: Y → Z

g y = z
 assumption.

→ hfiber f z ⨿ hfiber g z

g: Y → Z
z: Z
ff:= coprodofhfiberstohfiber f g z: hfiber f z ⨿ hfiber g z
→ hfiber (sumofmaps f g) z
gg:= hfibertocoprodofhfibers f g z: hfiber (sumofmaps f g) z
→ hfiber f z ⨿ hfiber g z
effgg: ∏ hsfg : hfiber (sumofmaps f g) z,
ff (gg hsfg) = hsfg
hg: hfiber g z
gg (ff (inr hg)) = inr hg

    
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Z
g: Y → Z
z: Z
ff:= coprodofhfiberstohfiber f g z: hfiber f z ⨿ hfiber g z
→ hfiber (sumofmaps f g) z
gg:= hfibertocoprodofhfibers f g z: hfiber (sumofmaps f g) z
→ hfiber f z ⨿ hfiber g z
effgg: ∏ hsfg : hfiber (sumofmaps f g) z,
ff (gg hsfg) = hsfg
x: X
fe: f x = z
gg (ff (inl (x,, fe))) = inl (x,, fe)
 
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Z
g: Y → Z
z: Z
ff:= coprodofhfiberstohfiber f g z: hfiber f z ⨿ hfiber g z
→ hfiber (sumofmaps f g) z
gg:= hfibertocoprodofhfibers f g z: hfiber (sumofmaps f g) z
→ hfiber f z ⨿ hfiber g z
effgg: ∏ hsfg : hfiber (sumofmaps f g) z,
ff (gg hsfg) = hsfg
x: X
fe: f x = z
inl (make_hfiber f x fe) = inl (x,, fe)
 apply idpath.

z: Z
ff:= coprodofhfiberstohfiber f g z: hfiber f z ⨿ hfiber g z
→ hfiber (sumofmaps f g) z
gg:= hfibertocoprodofhfibers f g z: hfiber (sumofmaps f g) z
→ hfiber f z ⨿ hfiber g z
effgg: ∏ hsfg : hfiber (sumofmaps f g) z,
ff (gg hsfg) = hsfg
hg: hfiber g z
gg (ff (inr hg)) = inr hg
 
X, Y, Z: UU

g: Y → Z
z: Z
ff:= coprodofhfiberstohfiber f g z: hfiber f z ⨿ hfiber g z
→ hfiber (sumofmaps f g) z
gg:= hfibertocoprodofhfibers f g z: hfiber (sumofmaps f g) z

effgg: ∏ hsfg : hfiber (sumofmaps f g) z,

f: X → Z
g: Y → Z
z: Z
ff:= coprodofhfiberstohfiber f g z: hfiber f z ⨿ hfiber g z
→ hfiber (sumofmaps f g) z
gg:= hfibertocoprodofhfibers f g z: hfiber (sumofmaps f g) z
→ hfiber f z ⨿ hfiber g z
effgg: ∏ hsfg : hfiber (sumofmaps f g) z,
ff (gg hsfg) = hsfg
y: Y
ge: g y = z
inr (make_hfiber g y ge) = inr (y,, ge)
 apply idpath.
  
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Z
g: Y → Z
z: Z
ff:= coprodofhfiberstohfiber f g z: hfiber f z ⨿ hfiber g z
→ hfiber (sumofmaps f g) z
gg:= hfibertocoprodofhfibers f g z: hfiber (sumofmaps f g) z
→ hfiber f z ⨿ hfiber g z
effgg: ∏ hsfg : hfiber (sumofmaps f g) z,
ff (gg hsfg) = hsfg
eggff: ∏ hfg : hfiber f z ⨿ hfiber g z,
gg (ff hfg) = hfg
isweq ff

  apply (isweq_iso _ _ eggff effgg).
Defined.




(** *** Theorem saying that the sum of two functions of h-level (S (S n)) is of hlevel (S (S n)) *)



n: nat
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Z
g: Y → Z
isf: isofhlevelf (S (S n)) f
isg: isofhlevelf (S (S n)) g
isofhlevelf (S (S n)) (sumofmaps f g)


n: nat
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Z
g: Y → Z
isf: isofhlevelf (S (S n)) f
isg: isofhlevelf (S (S n)) g
isofhlevelf (S (S n)) (sumofmaps f g)

  
n: nat
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Z
g: Y → Z
isf: isofhlevelf (S (S n)) f
isg: isofhlevelf (S (S n)) g
isofhlevelf (S (S n)) (sumofmaps f g)
 
n: nat
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Z
g: Y → Z
isf: isofhlevelf (S (S n)) f
isg: isofhlevelf (S (S n)) g
z: Z
isofhlevel (S (S n)) (hfiber (sumofmaps f g) z)

  
n: nat
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Z
g: Y → Z
isf: isofhlevelf (S (S n)) f
isg: isofhlevelf (S (S n)) g
z: Z
w:= weqhfibersofsumofmaps f g z: hfiber f z ⨿ hfiber g z ≃ hfiber (sumofmaps f g) z
isofhlevel (S (S n)) (hfiber (sumofmaps f g) z)

  
n: nat
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Z
g: Y → Z
isf: isofhlevelf (S (S n)) f
isg: isofhlevelf (S (S n)) g
z: Z
w:= weqhfibersofsumofmaps f g z: hfiber f z ⨿ hfiber g z ≃ hfiber (sumofmaps f g) z
is:= isofhlevelssncoprod n (hfiber f z) (hfiber g z)
  (isf z) (isg z): isofhlevel (S (S n)) (hfiber f z ⨿ hfiber g z)
isofhlevel (S (S n)) (hfiber (sumofmaps f g) z)

  apply (isofhlevelweqf _ w is).
Defined.



(** *** The sum of two functions of h-level n with non-intersecting images is of h-level n *)



X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Z
g: Y → Z
noi: ∏ (x : X) (y : Y), f x != g y
z: Z
hfiber f z → hfiber g z → ∅


X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Z
g: Y → Z
noi: ∏ (x : X) (y : Y), f x != g y
z: Z
hfiber f z → hfiber g z → ∅

  
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Z
g: Y → Z
noi: ∏ (x : X) (y : Y), f x != g y
z: Z
hfz: hfiber f z
hgz: hfiber g z
∅

  
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Z
g: Y → Z
noi: ∏ (x : X) (y : Y), f x != g y
z: Z
x: X
fe: f x = z
hgz: hfiber g z
∅
 
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Z
g: Y → Z
noi: ∏ (x : X) (y : Y), f x != g y
z: Z
x: X
fe: f x = z
y: Y
ge: g y = z
∅

  apply (noi x y (pathscomp0 fe (pathsinv0 ge))).
Defined.

w1:= invweq (weqhfibersofsumofmaps f g z): hfiber (sumofmaps f g) z
≃ hfiber f z ⨿ hfiber g z
hfiber (sumofmaps f g) z ≃ hfiber f z

  
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Z
g: Y → Z

w1:= invweq (weqhfibersofsumofmaps f g z): hfiber (sumofmaps f g) z
≃ hfiber f z ⨿ hfiber g z
a: ¬ hfiber g z
hfiber (sumofmaps f g) z ≃ hfiber f z

  
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Z
g: Y → Z
noi: ∏ (x : X) (y : Y), f x != g y
z: Z
xe: hfiber f z
w1:= invweq (weqhfibersofsumofmaps f g z): hfiber (sumofmaps f g) z
≃ hfiber f z ⨿ hfiber g z
a: ¬ hfiber g z
w2:= invweq (weqii1withneg (hfiber f z) a): hfiber f z ⨿ hfiber g z ≃ hfiber f z
hfiber (sumofmaps f g) z ≃ hfiber f z
 apply (weqcomp w1 w2).
Defined.

  apply (weqcomp w1 w2).

X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Z
g: Y → Z
isf: isofhlevelf 0 f
isg: isofhlevelf 0 g

z: Z
zinx:= invweq (make_weq f isf) z: X
ziny:= invweq (make_weq g isg) z: Y
ex: f zinx = z
ey: g ziny = z
isofhlevel 0 (hfiber (sumofmaps f g) z)

    induction ((noi zinx ziny) (pathscomp0 ex (pathsinv0 ey))).

X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Z
g: Y → Z

  → isofhlevel n (hfiber (sumofmaps f g) z)

isg: isofhlevelf (S n) g

n: nat
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Z
g: Y → Z
isf: isofhlevelf (S n) f
isg: isofhlevelf (S n) g
noi: ∏ (x : X) (y : Y), f x != g y
z: Z
IHn: isofhlevelf n f
→ isofhlevelf n g
  → isofhlevel n (hfiber (sumofmaps f g) z)
hfgz: hfiber (sumofmaps f g) z
xe: hfiber f z

 apply (isofhlevelweqb _ (weqhfibernoi1 f g noi z xe) (isf z)).
    
n: nat
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Z
g: Y → Z
isf: isofhlevelf (S n) f
isg: isofhlevelf (S n) g
noi: ∏ (x : X) (y : Y), f x != g y
z: Z
IHn: isofhlevelf n f
→ isofhlevelf n g
  → isofhlevel n (hfiber (sumofmaps f g) z)
hfgz: hfiber (sumofmaps f g) z
ye: hfiber g z
isofhlevel (S n) (hfiber (sumofmaps f g) z)
 apply (isofhlevelweqb _ (weqhfibernoi2 f g noi z ye) (isg z)).
Defined.







(** *** Coproducts and complements *)



X, Y: UU
x: X
compl X x ⨿ Y → compl (X ⨿ Y) (inl x)


X, Y: UU
x: X
compl X x ⨿ Y → compl (X ⨿ Y) (inl x)

  
X, Y: UU
x: X
X0: compl X x ⨿ Y
compl (X ⨿ Y) (inl x)
 
X, Y: UU
x: X
c: compl X x
compl (X ⨿ Y) (inl x)
X, Y: UU
x: X
y: Y
compl (X ⨿ Y) (inl x)

  
X, Y: UU
x: X
c: compl X x
compl (X ⨿ Y) (inl x)
 
X, Y: UU
x: X
c: compl X x
inl x != inl (pr1 c)

    
X, Y: UU
x: X
c: compl X x
e: x != pr1 c
inl x != inl (pr1 c)

    apply (negf (invmaponpathsincl (@ii1 _ _) (isinclii1 X Y) _ _) e).
  
X, Y: UU
x: X
y: Y
compl (X ⨿ Y) (inl x)
 
X, Y: UU
x: X
y: Y
inl x != inr y
 apply (negf (pathsinv0) (negpathsii2ii1 x y)).
Defined.



X, Y: UU
x: X
compl (X ⨿ Y) (inl x) → compl X x ⨿ Y


X, Y: UU
x: X
compl (X ⨿ Y) (inl x) → compl X x ⨿ Y

x: X

x: X
t: X ⨿ Y
x0: inl x != t
compl X x ⨿ Y

x, x1: X
x0: inl x != inl x1
compl X x ⨿ Y
X, Y: UU
x: X
y: Y
x0: inl x != inr y
compl X x ⨿ Y

  
X, Y: UU
x, x1: X
x0: inl x != inl x1
compl X x ⨿ Y
 
X, Y: UU
x, x1: X
x0: inl x != inl x1
ne: x != x1
compl X x ⨿ Y

    apply (ii1 (make_compl _ _ x1 ne)).
  
X, Y: UU
x: X
y: Y
x0: inl x != inr y
compl X x ⨿ Y
 apply (ii2 y).
Defined.

x: X
isweq (tocompltoii1x X Y x)

x: X

isweq f

  
X, Y: UU
x: X
f:= tocompltoii1x X Y x: compl X x ⨿ Y → compl (X ⨿ Y) (inl x)

∏ nexy : compl X x ⨿ Y, g (f nexy) = nexy
X, Y: UU
x: X
f:= tocompltoii1x X Y x: compl X x ⨿ Y → compl (X ⨿ Y) (inl x)
g:= fromcompltoii1x X Y x: compl (X ⨿ Y) (inl x) → compl X x ⨿ Y
egf: ∏ nexy : compl X x ⨿ Y, g (f nexy) = nexy
isweq f

x: X
f:= tocompltoii1x X Y x: compl X x ⨿ Y → compl (X ⨿ Y) (inl x)
g:= fromcompltoii1x X Y x: compl (X ⨿ Y) (inl x) → compl X x ⨿ Y
t: X
x0: x != t
g (f (inl (t,, x0))) = inl (t,, x0)
 
X, Y: UU
x: X
f:= tocompltoii1x X Y x: compl X x ⨿ Y → compl (X ⨿ Y) (inl x)
g:= fromcompltoii1x X Y x: compl (X ⨿ Y) (inl x) → compl X x ⨿ Y
t: X
x0: x != t
inl
  (make_compl X x t
     (negf (maponpaths inl)
        (negf
           (invmaponpathsincl inl (isinclii1 X Y) x t)
           x0))) = inl (t,, x0)

      
X, Y: UU
x: X
f:= tocompltoii1x X Y x: compl X x ⨿ Y → compl (X ⨿ Y) (inl x)
g:= fromcompltoii1x X Y x: compl (X ⨿ Y) (inl x) → compl X x ⨿ Y
t: X
x0: x != t
e: negf (maponpaths inl)
  (negf
     (invmaponpathsincl inl (isinclii1 X Y) x t)
     x0) = x0
inl
  (make_compl X x t
     (negf (maponpaths inl)
        (negf
           (invmaponpathsincl inl (isinclii1 X Y) x t)
           x0))) = inl (t,, x0)

      apply (maponpaths (fun ee : x != t => ii1 (make_compl X x t ee)) e).

y: Y
g (f (inr y)) = inr y

x: X

x: X
f:= tocompltoii1x X Y x: compl X x ⨿ Y → compl (X ⨿ Y) (inl x)

efg: ∏ neii1x : compl (X ⨿ Y) (inl x),
f (g neii1x) = neii1x
isweq f

  apply (isweq_iso f g egf efg).
Defined.

x: inr y != inr y0
inr y0,,
negf (invmaponpathsincl inr (isinclii2 X Y) y y0)
  (negf (maponpaths inr) x) = 
inr y0,, x

      
X, Y: UU
y: Y
f:= tocompltoii2y X Y y: X ⨿ compl Y y → compl (X ⨿ Y) (inr y)
g:= fromcompltoii2y X Y y: compl (X ⨿ Y) (inr y) → X ⨿ compl Y y
egf: ∏ nexy : X ⨿ compl Y y, g (f nexy) = nexy
y0: Y
x: inr y != inr y0
e: negf (invmaponpathsincl inr (isinclii2 X Y) y y0)
  (negf (maponpaths inr) x) = x
inr y0,,
negf (invmaponpathsincl inr (isinclii2 X Y) y y0)
  (negf (maponpaths inr) x) = 
inr y0,, x

      apply (maponpaths (fun ee : (neg (paths (ii2 y) (ii2 y0)))
                         => (make_compl _ _ (ii2 y0) ee)) e).
  
X, Y: UU
y: Y
f:= tocompltoii2y X Y y: X ⨿ compl Y y → compl (X ⨿ Y) (inr y)
g:= fromcompltoii2y X Y y: compl (X ⨿ Y) (inr y) → X ⨿ compl Y y
egf: ∏ nexy : X ⨿ compl Y y, g (f nexy) = nexy
efg: ∏ neii2x : compl (X ⨿ Y) (inr y),
f (g neii2x) = neii2x
isweq f

  apply (isweq_iso f g egf efg).
Defined.







Definition tocompltodisjoint (X : UU) : X -> compl (coprod X unit) (ii2 tt)
  := λ x : _, make_compl _ _ (ii1 x) (negpathsii2ii1 x tt).


X: UU
compl (X ⨿ unit) (inr tt) → X


X: UU
compl (X ⨿ unit) (inr tt) → X

x: inr tt != t

X: UU
u: unit
x: inr tt != inr u
X

X
 apply (fromempty (x (idpath (ii2 tt)))).
Defined.

∏ xx : compl (X ⨿ unit) (inr tt), ff (gg xx) = xx

ff:= tocompltodisjoint X: X → compl (X ⨿ unit) (inr tt)

ff:= tocompltodisjoint X: X → compl (X ⨿ unit) (inr tt)

egf: ∏ x : X, gg (ff x) = x
∏ xx : compl (X ⨿ unit) (inr tt), ff (gg xx) = xx

ff:= tocompltodisjoint X: X → compl (X ⨿ unit) (inr tt)
gg:= fromcompltodisjoint X: compl (X ⨿ unit) (inr tt) → X
egf: ∏ x : X, gg (ff x) = x
xx: compl (X ⨿ unit) (inr tt)
ff (gg xx) = xx

egf: ∏ x : X, gg (ff x) = x
t: X ⨿ unit
x: inr tt != t
ff (gg (t,, x)) = t,, x

egf: ∏ x : X, gg (ff x) = x
x0: X
x: inr tt != inl x0
ff (gg (inl x0,, x)) = inl x0,, x

ff:= tocompltodisjoint X: X → compl (X ⨿ unit) (inr tt)

egf: ∏ x : X, gg (ff x) = x
u: unit

ff (gg (inr u,, x)) = inr u,, x

ff x0 = inl x0,, x

x0: X
x: inr tt != inl x0
tocompltodisjoint X x0 = inl x0,, x

ff:= tocompltodisjoint X: X → compl (X ⨿ unit) (inr tt)
gg:= fromcompltodisjoint X: compl (X ⨿ unit) (inr tt) → X
egf: ∏ x : X, gg (ff x) = x
x0: X
x: inr tt != inl x0
make_compl (X ⨿ unit) (inr tt) (inl x0)
  (negpathsii2ii1 x0 tt) = inl x0,, x
 
X: UU
ff:= tocompltodisjoint X: X → compl (X ⨿ unit) (inr tt)
gg:= fromcompltodisjoint X: compl (X ⨿ unit) (inr tt) → X
egf: ∏ x : X, gg (ff x) = x
x0: X
x: inr tt != inl x0
make_compl (X ⨿ unit) (inr tt) (inl x0)
  (negpathsii2ii1 x0 tt) = inl x0,, x

      
X: UU
ff:= tocompltodisjoint X: X → compl (X ⨿ unit) (inr tt)
gg:= fromcompltodisjoint X: compl (X ⨿ unit) (inr tt) → X
egf: ∏ x : X, gg (ff x) = x
x0: X
x: inr tt != inl x0
ee: negpathsii2ii1 x0 tt = x
make_compl (X ⨿ unit) (inr tt) (inl x0)
  (negpathsii2ii1 x0 tt) = inl x0,, x

      
X: UU
ff:= tocompltodisjoint X: X → compl (X ⨿ unit) (inr tt)
gg:= fromcompltodisjoint X: compl (X ⨿ unit) (inr tt) → X
egf: ∏ x : X, gg (ff x) = x
x0: X
make_compl (X ⨿ unit) (inr tt) (inl x0)
  (negpathsii2ii1 x0 tt) =
inl x0,, negpathsii2ii1 x0 tt
 apply idpath.
    
X: UU
ff:= tocompltodisjoint X: X → compl (X ⨿ unit) (inr tt)
gg:= fromcompltodisjoint X: compl (X ⨿ unit) (inr tt) → X
egf: ∏ x : X, gg (ff x) = x
u: unit
x: inr tt != inr u
ff (gg (inr u,, x)) = inr u,, x
 
X: UU
ff:= tocompltodisjoint X: X → compl (X ⨿ unit) (inr tt)
gg:= fromcompltodisjoint X: compl (X ⨿ unit) (inr tt) → X
egf: ∏ x : X, gg (ff x) = x
x: inr tt != inr tt
ff (gg (inr tt,, x)) = inr tt,, x
 
X: UU
ff:= tocompltodisjoint X: X → compl (X ⨿ unit) (inr tt)
gg:= fromcompltodisjoint X: compl (X ⨿ unit) (inr tt) → X
egf: ∏ x : X, gg (ff x) = x
x: inr tt != inr tt
ff (fromempty (x (idpath (inr tt)))) = inr tt,, x
 apply (fromempty (x (idpath _))).
  
X: UU
ff:= tocompltodisjoint X: X → compl (X ⨿ unit) (inr tt)
gg:= fromcompltodisjoint X: compl (X ⨿ unit) (inr tt) → X
egf: ∏ x : X, gg (ff x) = x
efg: ∏ xx : compl (X ⨿ unit) (inr tt), ff (gg xx) = xx
isweq ff

  apply (isweq_iso ff gg egf efg).
Defined.


Definition weqtocompltodisjoint (X : UU) : X ≃ compl (X ⨿ unit) (ii2 tt)
  := make_weq _ (isweqtocompltodisjoint X).


X: UU
isweq (fromcompltodisjoint X)


X: UU
isweq (fromcompltodisjoint X)

  
X: UU
isweq (fromcompltodisjoint X)
 apply (isweqinvmap (weqtocompltodisjoint X)).
Defined.

(** ** Decidable propositions and decidable inclusions *)

(** *** Decidable propositions [ isdecprop ] *)


X: UU
isaprop X → X ⨿ ¬ X → iscontr (X ⨿ ¬ X)

(* This contractibility was the old definition of isdecpropif.  We can probably
  do without it. *)

X: UU
isaprop X → X ⨿ ¬ X → iscontr (X ⨿ ¬ X)

iscontr (X ⨿ ¬ X)

is: isaprop X
a: X ⨿ ¬ X
is1: isaprop (X ⨿ ¬ X)
iscontr (X ⨿ ¬ X)

  apply (iscontraprop1 is1 a).
Defined.

x, x': X

 apply (isdecpropif _ (isasetifdeceq _ is x x') (is x x')).
Defined.

X: UU
is1: isdecprop X
is2: X ⨿ ¬ X
adjevinv: ¬¬ X → X
is3: isaprop (¬¬ X)
isweq (todneg X)

  apply (isweqimplimpl (todneg X) adjevinv is1 is3).
Defined.

fs: fibseqstr f g z

isg: isofhlevelf 1 g

y: Y
isdecprop X
 apply (isdecpropfibseq1 _ _ y (fibseq1 f g z fs y)
                            (isdecproppaths isz (g y) z)
                            (isdecproptoisaprop _ isy)).

f: X → Y

isy: isdecprop Y
isz: isdeceq Z
isg: isofhlevelf 1 g
isp: isaprop X
ny: ¬ Y
isdecprop X
 apply (isdecpropif _ isp (ii2 (negf f ny))).

(** *** Paths to and from an isolated point form a decidable proposition *)


X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
x': X
isdecprop (x = x')


X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
x': X
isdecprop (x = x')

x': X
isaprop (x = x')

x: X
is: isisolated X x
x': X
(x = x') ⨿ (x != x')

  
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
x': X
isaprop (x = x')
 
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
x': X
isisolated X x
 assumption.
  
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
x': X
(x = x') ⨿ (x != x')
 apply (is x').
Defined.


X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
x': X
isdecprop (x' = x)


X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
x': X
isdecprop (x' = x)

  
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
x': X
isdecprop (x' = x)

  apply (isdecpropweqf (weqpathsinv0 x x')
                       (isdecproppathsfromisolated X x is x')).
Defined.


(** *** Decidable inclusions *)



Definition isdecincl {X Y : UU} (f : X -> Y) := ∏ y : Y, isdecprop (hfiber f y).

X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
isdecincl f → isincl f


X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
isdecincl f → isincl f

  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
is: isdecincl f
y: Y
isofhlevel 1 (hfiber f y)
 apply (isdecproptoisaprop _ (is y)).
Defined.
Coercion isdecincltoisincl : isdecincl >-> isincl.


X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
isweq f → isdecincl f


X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
isweq f → isdecincl f

  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
iswf: isweq f
isdecincl f
 
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
iswf: isweq f
y: Y
isdecprop (hfiber f y)
 apply (isdecpropfromiscontr (iswf y)).
Defined.


X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
isdecincl f → isdecprop Y → isdecprop X


X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
isdecincl f → isdecprop Y → isdecprop X

  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
isf: isdecincl f
isy: isdecprop Y
isdecprop X

  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
isf: isdecincl f
isy: isdecprop Y
y: Y
isdecprop X
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
isf: isdecincl f
isy: isdecprop Y
n: ¬ Y
isdecprop X

  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
isf: isdecincl f
isy: isdecprop Y
y: Y
isdecprop X
 
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
isf: isdecincl f
isy: isdecprop Y
y: Y
w: hfiber f y ≃ X
isdecprop X

    apply (isdecpropweqf w (isf y)).
  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
isf: isdecincl f
isy: isdecprop Y
n: ¬ Y
isdecprop X
 
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
isf: isdecincl f
isy: isdecprop Y
n: ¬ Y
isaprop X
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
isf: isdecincl f
isy: isdecprop Y
n: ¬ Y
X ⨿ ¬ X
 
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
isf: isdecincl f
isy: isdecprop Y
n: ¬ Y
X ⨿ ¬ X
 apply (ii2 (negf f n)).
Defined.



X, Y: UU
isdecincl inl


X, Y: UU
isdecincl inl

  
X, Y: UU
isdecincl inl
 
X, Y: UU
y: X ⨿ Y
isdecprop (hfiber inl y)
 
X, Y: UU
x: X
isdecprop (hfiber inl (inl x))
X, Y: UU
y: Y
isdecprop (hfiber inl (inr y))

  
X, Y: UU
x: X
isdecprop (hfiber inl (inl x))
 apply (isdecpropif _ (isinclii1 X Y (ii1 x))
                       (ii1 (make_hfiber (@ii1 _ _) x (idpath _)))).
  
X, Y: UU
y: Y
isdecprop (hfiber inl (inr y))
 apply (isdecpropif _ (isinclii1 X Y (ii2 y))
                       (ii2 (neghfiberii1y X Y y))).
Defined.

isdecincl inr


X, Y: UU
isdecincl inr

isdecincl inr

isdecprop (hfiber inr (inl x))
X, Y: UU
y: Y
isdecprop (hfiber inr (inr y))

  
X, Y: UU
x: X
isdecprop (hfiber inr (inl x))
 apply (isdecpropif _ (isinclii2 X Y (ii1 x)) (ii2 (neghfiberii2x X Y x))).
  
X, Y: UU
y: Y
isdecprop (hfiber inr (inr y))
 apply (isdecpropif _ (isinclii2 X Y (ii2 y))
                       (ii1 (make_hfiber (@ii2 _ _) y (idpath _)))).
Defined.



X: UU
P: X → UU
is: ∏ x : X, isdecprop (P x)
isdecincl pr1


X: UU
P: X → UU
is: ∏ x : X, isdecprop (P x)
isdecincl pr1

  
X: UU
P: X → UU
is: ∏ x : X, isdecprop (P x)
isdecincl pr1
 
X: UU
P: X → UU
is: ∏ x : X, isdecprop (P x)
x: X
isdecprop (hfiber pr1 x)

  
X: UU
P: X → UU
is: ∏ x : X, isdecprop (P x)
x: X
w: P x ≃ hfiber pr1 x
isdecprop (hfiber pr1 x)

  apply (isdecpropweqf w (is x)).
Defined.



X, Y: UU
f, g: X → Y
h: ∏ x : X, f x = g x
is: isdecincl f
isdecincl g

is: isdecincl f
isdecincl g

isdecincl g
 
X, Y: UU
f, g: X → Y
h: ∏ x : X, f x = g x
is: isdecincl f
y: Y
isdecprop (hfiber g y)

  apply (isdecpropweqf (weqhfibershomot f g h y) (is y)).
Defined.

f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
isf: isdecincl f
isg: isdecincl g
z: Z
gf:= λ x : X, g (f x): X → Z
wy: ∏ ye : hfiber g z,
hfiber f (pr1 ye)
≃ hfiber (hfibersgftog f g z) ye
isdecprop (hfiber gf z)

  
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
isf: isdecincl f
isg: isdecincl g
z: Z
gf:= λ x : X, g (f x): X → Z
wy: ∏ ye : hfiber g z,
hfiber f (pr1 ye)
≃ hfiber (hfibersgftog f g z) ye
∏ y : Y, hfiber f y ≃ hfiber gf (g y)

≃ hfiber (hfibersgftog f g z) ye

≃ hfiber (hfibersgftog f g z) ye

isincl g
 apply (isdecincltoisincl _ isg).

z: Z
gf:= λ x : X, g (f x): X → Z

≃ hfiber (hfibersgftog f g z) ye

X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
isf: isdecincl f
isg: isdecincl g
z: Z
gf:= λ x : X, g (f x): X → Z
wy: ∏ ye : hfiber g z,
hfiber f (pr1 ye)
≃ hfiber (hfibersgftog f g z) ye
ww: ∏ y : Y, hfiber f y ≃ hfiber gf (g y)
nye: ¬ hfiber g z
isdecprop (hfiber gf z)

f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
isf: isdecincl f
isg: isdecincl g
z: Z
gf:= λ x : X, g (f x): X → Z
wy: ∏ ye : hfiber g z,

≃ hfiber (hfibersgftog f g z) ye
ww: ∏ y : Y, hfiber f y ≃ hfiber gf (g y)

isdecprop (hfiber gf z)
 
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
isf: isdecincl f
isg: isdecincl g
z: Z
gf:= λ x : X, g (f x): X → Z
wy: ∏ ye : hfiber g z,
hfiber f (pr1 ye)
≃ hfiber (hfibersgftog f g z) ye
ww: ∏ y : Y, hfiber f y ≃ hfiber gf (g y)
y: Y
e: g y = z
isdecprop (hfiber gf z)
 
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
isf: isdecincl f
isg: isdecincl g
gf:= λ x : X, g (f x): X → Z
y: Y
wy: ∏ ye : hfiber g (g y),
hfiber f (pr1 ye)
≃ hfiber (hfibersgftog f g (g y)) ye
ww: ∏ y : Y, hfiber f y ≃ hfiber gf (g y)
isdecprop (hfiber gf (g y))
 apply (isdecpropweqf (ww y) (isf y)).
  
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
isf: isdecincl f
isg: isdecincl g
z: Z
gf:= λ x : X, g (f x): X → Z
wy: ∏ ye : hfiber g z,
hfiber f (pr1 ye)
≃ hfiber (hfibersgftog f g z) ye
ww: ∏ y : Y, hfiber f y ≃ hfiber gf (g y)
nye: ¬ hfiber g z
isdecprop (hfiber gf z)
 
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
isf: isdecincl f
isg: isdecincl g
z: Z
gf:= λ x : X, g (f x): X → Z
wy: ∏ ye : hfiber g z,
hfiber f (pr1 ye)
≃ hfiber (hfibersgftog f g z) ye
ww: ∏ y : Y, hfiber f y ≃ hfiber gf (g y)
nye: ¬ hfiber g z
hfiber gf z ≃ hfiber g z
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
isf: isdecincl f
isg: isdecincl g
z: Z
gf:= λ x : X, g (f x): X → Z
wy: ∏ ye : hfiber g z,
hfiber f (pr1 ye)
≃ hfiber (hfibersgftog f g z) ye
ww: ∏ y : Y, hfiber f y ≃ hfiber gf (g y)
nye: ¬ hfiber g z
wz: hfiber gf z ≃ hfiber g z
isdecprop (hfiber gf z)

    
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
isf: isdecincl f
isg: isdecincl g
z: Z
gf:= λ x : X, g (f x): X → Z
wy: ∏ ye : hfiber g z,
hfiber f (pr1 ye)
≃ hfiber (hfibersgftog f g z) ye
ww: ∏ y : Y, hfiber f y ≃ hfiber gf (g y)
nye: ¬ hfiber g z
hfiber gf z ≃ hfiber g z

      
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
isf: isdecincl f
isg: isdecincl g
z: Z
gf:= λ x : X, g (f x): X → Z
wy: ∏ ye : hfiber g z,
hfiber f (pr1 ye)
≃ hfiber (hfibersgftog f g z) ye
ww: ∏ y : Y, hfiber f y ≃ hfiber gf (g y)
nye: ¬ hfiber g z
isweq (hfibersgftog f g z)
 
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
isf: isdecincl f
isg: isdecincl g
z: Z
gf:= λ x : X, g (f x): X → Z
wy: ∏ ye : hfiber g z,
hfiber f (pr1 ye)
≃ hfiber (hfibersgftog f g z) ye
ww: ∏ y : Y, hfiber f y ≃ hfiber gf (g y)
nye: ¬ hfiber g z
ye: hfiber g z
iscontr (hfiber (hfibersgftog f g z) ye)
 induction (nye ye).
    
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
isf: isdecincl f
isg: isdecincl g
z: Z
gf:= λ x : X, g (f x): X → Z
wy: ∏ ye : hfiber g z,
hfiber f (pr1 ye)
≃ hfiber (hfibersgftog f g z) ye
ww: ∏ y : Y, hfiber f y ≃ hfiber gf (g y)
nye: ¬ hfiber g z
wz: hfiber gf z ≃ hfiber g z
isdecprop (hfiber gf z)

    apply (isdecpropweqb wz (isg z)).
Defined.

(** The conditions of the following theorem can be weakened by assuming only
  that the h-fibers of g satisfy [ isdeceq ] i.e. are "sets with decidable
  equality". *)


X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
isg: isincl g
isgf: isdecincl (λ x : X, g (f x))
isdecincl f


X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
isg: isincl g
isgf: isdecincl (λ x : X, g (f x))
isdecincl f

f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
isg: isincl g
isgf: isdecincl (λ x : X, g (f x))
isdecincl f
 
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
isg: isincl g
isgf: isdecincl (λ x : X, g (f x))
y: Y
isdecprop (hfiber f y)
 
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
isg: isincl g
isgf: isdecincl (λ x : X, g (f x))
y: Y
gf:= λ x : X, g (f x): X → Z
isdecprop (hfiber f y)

  
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
isg: isincl g
isgf: isdecincl (λ x : X, g (f x))
y: Y
gf:= λ x : X, g (f x): X → Z
ww: hfiber f y ≃ hfiber gf (g y)
isdecprop (hfiber f y)

  apply (isdecpropweqb ww (isgf (g y))).
Defined.

(** *)

isdecprop (hfiber g z)

isdecprop (hfiber g z)

isgf: isdecincl (λ x : X, g (f x))

gf:= λ x : X, g (f x): X → Z
hfiber gf z ≃ hfiber g z

g: Y → Z
isf: isweq f
isgf: isdecincl (λ x : X, g (f x))
z: Z
gf:= λ x : X, g (f x): X → Z
w: hfiber gf z ≃ hfiber g z
isdecprop (hfiber g z)

f: X → Y

isf: isweq f
isgf: isdecincl (λ x : X, g (f x))
z: Z
gf:= λ x : X, g (f x): X → Z
hfiber gf z ≃ hfiber g z

    
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
isf: isweq f
isgf: isdecincl (λ x : X, g (f x))
z: Z
gf:= λ x : X, g (f x): X → Z
isweq (hfibersgftog f g z)
 
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
isf: isweq f
isgf: isdecincl (λ x : X, g (f x))
z: Z
gf:= λ x : X, g (f x): X → Z
ye: hfiber g z
iscontr (hfiber (hfibersgftog f g z) ye)

    
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
isf: isweq f
isgf: isdecincl (λ x : X, g (f x))
z: Z
gf:= λ x : X, g (f x): X → Z
ye: hfiber g z
ww: hfiber f (pr1 ye)
≃ hfiber (hfibersgftog f g z) ye
iscontr (hfiber (hfibersgftog f g z) ye)

    apply (iscontrweqf ww (isf (pr1 ye))).
  
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
isf: isweq f
isgf: isdecincl (λ x : X, g (f x))
z: Z
gf:= λ x : X, g (f x): X → Z
w: hfiber gf z ≃ hfiber g z
isdecprop (hfiber g z)

  apply (isdecpropweqf w (isgf z)).
Defined.



(** *** Decidable inclusions and isolated points *)


X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
x: X
isdecincl f → isisolated X x → isisolated Y (f x)


X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
x: X
isdecincl f → isisolated X x → isisolated Y (f x)

  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
x: X
isf: isdecincl f
isx: isisolated X x
isisolated Y (f x)

  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
x: X
isf: isdecincl f
isx: isisolated X x
∏ y : Y, isdecincl (d1g f y x)
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
x: X
isf: isdecincl f
isx: isisolated X x
is': ∏ y : Y, isdecincl (d1g f y x)
isisolated Y (f x)

  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
x: X
isf: isdecincl f
isx: isisolated X x
∏ y : Y, isdecincl (d1g f y x)

    
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
x: X
isf: isdecincl f
isx: isisolated X x
y: Y
isdecincl (d1g f y x)
 
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
x: X
isf: isdecincl f
isx: isisolated X x
y: Y
xe: hfiber f y
isdecprop (hfiber (d1g f y x) xe)
 
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
x: X
isf: isdecincl f
isx: isisolated X x
y: Y
xe: hfiber f y
w:= ezweq2g f x xe: pr1 xe = x ≃ hfiber (make_hfiber f x) xe
isdecprop (hfiber (d1g f y x) xe)

    apply (isdecpropweqf w (isdecproppathstoisolated X x isx _)).
  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
x: X
isf: isdecincl f
isx: isisolated X x
is': ∏ y : Y, isdecincl (d1g f y x)
isisolated Y (f x)

  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
x: X
isf: isdecincl f
isx: isisolated X x
is': ∏ y : Y, isdecincl (d1g f y x)
is'': ∏ y : Y, isdecprop (f x = y)
isisolated Y (f x)

  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
x: X
isf: isdecincl f
isx: isisolated X x
is': ∏ y : Y, isdecincl (d1g f y x)
is'': ∏ y : Y, isdecprop (f x = y)
y': Y
(f x = y') ⨿ (f x != y')

  apply (pr1 (is'' y')).
Defined.



(** *** Decidable inclusions and coprojections *)


Definition negimage {X Y : UU} (f : X -> Y) : UU
  := total2 (λ y : Y, neg (hfiber f y)).
Definition make_negimage {X Y : UU} (f : X -> Y) :
  ∏ t : Y, ¬ hfiber f t → ∑ y : Y, ¬ hfiber f y
  := tpair (λ y : Y, neg (hfiber f y)).


X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
is: isincl f
isincl (sumofmaps f pr1)


X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
is: isincl f
isincl (sumofmaps f pr1)

  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
is: isincl f
isincl (sumofmaps f pr1)

is: isincl f
∏ (x : X) (nx : negimage f), f x != pr1 nx

noi: ∏ (x : X) (nx : negimage f), f x != pr1 nx

e: f x = pr1 nx
∅
 
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
is: isincl f
x: X
y: Y
nhf: ¬ hfiber f y
e: f x = pr1 (y,, nhf)
∅
 
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
is: isincl f
x: X
y: Y
nhf: ¬ hfiber f y
e: f x = y
∅

    apply (nhf (make_hfiber _ x e)).

X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
is: isincl f
noi: ∏ (x : X) (nx : negimage f), f x != pr1 nx
y: Y
isaprop (¬ hfiber f y)
 apply isapropneg.
  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
is: isincl f
noi: ∏ (x : X) (nx : negimage f), f x != pr1 nx
is': isincl pr1
isincl (sumofmaps f pr1)

  apply (isofhlevelfsumofmapsnoi 1 f _ is is' noi).
Defined.


Definition iscoproj {X Y : UU} (f : X -> Y) : UU
  := isweq (sumofmaps f (@pr1 _ (λ y : Y, neg (hfiber f y)))).

Definition weqcoproj {X Y : UU} (f : X -> Y) (is : iscoproj f) :
  weq (coprod X (negimage f)) Y := make_weq _ is.

f: X → Y

iscoproj f

X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
is: iscoproj f
g:= sumofmaps f pr1: X ⨿ (∑ y : Y, ¬ hfiber f y) → Y
f':= λ x : X, g (inl x): X → Y
isdecincl f

  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
is: iscoproj f
g:= sumofmaps f pr1: X ⨿ (∑ y : Y, ¬ hfiber f y) → Y
f':= λ x : X, g (inl x): X → Y
is': isdecincl f'
isdecincl f

  assumption.
Defined.
